        "contents": "// =============================================================================\n// Start Server\n// =============================================================================\n\nconst start = async () =&gt; {\n  try {\n    // Initialize database connection\n    fastify.log.info('Connecting to database...');\n    try {\n      const dbHealthy = await db.healthCheck();\n      if (!dbHealthy) {\n        throw new Error('Database health check returned false');\n      }\n    } catch (dbError) {\n      const err = dbError as Error;\n      fastify.log.error({ err, message: err.message }, 'Database connection error');\n      throw new Error(&#96;Failed to connect to database: ${err.message}&#96;);\n    }\n    fastify.log.info('✅ Database connected');\n\n    // Initialize Redis connection\n    fastify.log.info('Connecting to Redis...');\n    getRedisConnection();\n    fastify.log.info('✅ Redis connected');\n\n    // Initialize BullMQ queues\n    fastify.log.info('Initializing queues...');\n    initializeQueues();\n    fastify.log.info('✅ Queues initialized');\n\n    // Start listening\n    await fastify.listen({ \n      port: config.port, \n      host: config.host \n    });\n\n    fastify.log.info(&#96;\n╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗\n║                                                           ║\n║   🧬 DNA Marketing Engine v1.0.0                          ║\n║                                                           ║\n║   Server running at http://${config.host}:${config.port}              ║\n║   Environment: ${config.nodeEnv.padEnd(11)}                           ║\n║                                                           ║\n╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝\n    &#96;);\n\n  } catch (error) {\n    const err = error as Error;\n    fastify.log.error({ err, message: err.message, stack: err.stack },\n;",

        "contents": "// src/index.ts\n// DNA Marketing Engine - Main Entry Point\n// =============================================================================\n\nimport Fastify from 'fastify';\nimport cors from '@fastify/cors';\nimport { config, isDev } from './config/index.js';\nimport { db, closePool } from './db/index.js';\nimport { getRedisConnection, closeRedisConnection } from './config/redis.js';\nimport { initializeQueues, closeQueues } from './config/queues.js';\nimport { errorHandler, notFoundHandler } from './api/middleware/errorHandler.js';\nimport { eventsRoutes } from './api/routes/events.js';\nimport { leadsRoutes } from './api/routes/leads.js';\nimport { scoringRoutes } from './api/routes/scoring.js';\nimport { routingRoutes } from './api/routes/routing.js';\nimport { pipelinesRoutes } from './api/routes/pipelines.js';\nimport { dealsRoutes } from './api/routes/deals.js';\nimport { integrationsRoutes } from './api/routes/integrations.js';\nimport { tasksRoutes } from './api/routes/tasks.js';\nimport { automationRoutes } from './api/routes/automation.js';\nimport { gdprRoutes } from './api/routes/gdpr.js';\nimport { reportsRoutes } from './api/routes/reports.js';\nimport { teamRoutes } from './api/routes/team.js';\nimport { campaignsRoutes } from './api/routes/campaigns.js';\nimport { organizationsRoutes } from './api/routes/organizations.js';\nimport { triggersRoutes } from './api/routes/triggers.js';\nimport { emailRoutes } from './api/routes/email.js';\nimport { sequencesRoutes } from './api/routes/sequences.js';\nimport type { HealthCheckResponse } from './types/index.js';\n\n// =============================================================================\n// Create Fastify Instance\n// =============================================================================\n\nconst fastify = Fastify({\n  logger: {\n    level: config.logLevel,\n    transport: isDev ? {\n      target: 'pino-pretty',\n      options: {\n        colorize: true,\n        translateTime: 'HH:MM:ss',\n        ignore: 'pid,hostname'\n      }\n    } : undefined\n  },\n  requestIdHeader: 'x-request-id',\n  requestIdLogLabel: 'requestId'\n});\n\n// =============================================================================",

        "contents": "// =============================================================================\n// API Routes\n// =============================================================================\n\nawait fastify.register(eventsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(leadsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(scoringRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(routingRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(pipelinesRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(dealsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(integrationsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(tasksRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(automationRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(gdprRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(reportsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(teamRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(campaignsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(organizationsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(triggersRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(emailRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\nawait fastify.register(sequencesRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\n\n// =============================================================================\n// Graceful Shutdown\n// =============================================================================\n\nconst shutdown = async (signal: string) =&gt; {\n  fastify.log.info(&#96;Received ${signal}, shutting down gracefully...&#96;);\n  \n  try {\n    // Close HTTP server\n    await fastify.close();\n    fastify.log.info('HTTP server closed');\n\n    // Close queues\n    await closeQueues();\n    fastify.log.info('BullMQ queues closed');\n\n    // Close Redis\n    await closeRedisConnection();\n    fastify.log.info('Redis connection closed');\n\n    // Close database pool\n    await closePool();\n    fastify.log.info('Database pool closed');\n\n    process.exit(0);\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\n    fastify.log.error({ err: error }, 'Error during shutdown');\n    process.exit(1);\n  }\n};\n\nprocess.on('SIGTERM', () =&gt; shutdown('SIGTERM'));",

            "text": "    await closePool();",

          },
          {
            "text": "    fastify.log.info('Database pool closed');",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "    process.exit(0);",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "  } catch (error: unknown) {",

          },
          {

          },

            "text": "  }",

        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\DNA_ME_CRM_CURSOR_STEP_BY_STEP_GUIDE.md",

        "contents": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 3.2 Создай Redis подключение\n\n**В Cursor Chat:**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nCreate src/config/redis.ts:\n1. Import IORedis\n2. Create and export Redis connection using REDIS_URL from config\n3. Add connection event handlers (connect, error, close)\n4. Export connection for BullMQ\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 3.3 Создай Fastify сервер\n\n**В Cursor Chat:**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nCreate src/index.ts - main entry point:\n\n1. Import Fastify and plugins (@fastify/cors)\n2. Import config and db\n3. Create Fastify instance with logger (pino)\n4. Register CORS\n5. Add health check: GET /health\n6. Add ready check: GET /ready (checks DB and Redis)\n7. Import and register route modules (we'll create them next)\n8. Start server on PORT from config\n9. Handle graceful shutdown (SIGTERM, SIGINT)\n\nMake sure to test database connection on startup.\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 3.4 Запусти сервер и проверь\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\nnpm run dev\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nВ другом терминале:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ncurl http://localhost:3000/health\n# Ожидаем: {\"status\":\"ok\"}\n\ncurl http://localhost:3000/ready\n# Ожидаем: {\"status\":\"ready\",\"database\":\"connected\",\"redis\":\"connected\"}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n✅ **Checkpoint:** Сервер запускается, health/ready endpoints работают\n\n---\n\n# Этап 4: Event Ingestion (2 часа)\n\n## 4.1 Создай HMAC middleware\n\n**В Cursor Chat:**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nCreate src/api/middleware/hmac.ts:\n\n1. Export verifyHmacSignature middleware for Fastify\n2. Read X-Webhook-Signature header\n3. Calculate HMAC-SHA256 of raw request body using WEBHOOK_SECRET\n4. Compare signatures (timing-safe comparison)\n5. If invalid: return 401 Unauthorized\n6. If valid: continue to handler\n\nAlso export helper function to generate signature (for testing).\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 4.2 Создай BullMQ очереди\n\n**В Cursor Chat:**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nCreate src/config/queues.ts:\n\n1. Import Queue from bullmq\n2. Import redis connection\n3. Create and export queues:\n   - eventsQueue ('events')\n   - scoringQueue ('scoring')",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\README.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 87
          }
        },
        "contents": "# 🧬 DNA Marketing Engine\n\nA custom CRM platform with Smart Routing &amp; Intent Detection for the biotech industry.\n\n## Features\n\n- **Event Ingestion**: Receive marketing events from multiple channels (Waalaxy, Lemlist, Website, Ads, Conferences)\n- **Lead Scoring**: Real-time scoring with configurable rules and decay mechanism\n- **Intent Detection**: Automatic detection of product intent (Research Lab, B2B Lab, Co-Creation)\n- **Smart Routing**: Intelligent routing to the correct pipeline based on score + intent\n- **Automation Engine**: Automated stage movements, notifications, and task creation\n- **Integrations**: Moco (German finance) and Slack (alerts &amp; notifications)\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n| Component | Technology |\n|-----------|------------|\n| Runtime | Node.js 20+ |\n| Framework | Fastify |\n| Database | PostgreSQL 15+ |\n| Queue | Redis + BullMQ |\n| Language | TypeScript (strict) |\n| Validation | Zod |\n| Migrations | node-pg-migrate |\n\n## Prerequisites\n\n- Node.js 20+\n- Docker and Docker Compose\n- npm v9+\n\n## Quick Start\n\n### 1. Clone and Install\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ngit clone &lt;repository-url&gt;\ncd dna-marketing-engine\nnpm install\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 2. Environment Setup\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Copy example environment file\ncp env.example .env\n\n# Edit .env with your configuration\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3. Start Infrastructure\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Start PostgreSQL and Redis\ndocker-compose up -d\n\n# Wait for services to be healthy\ndocker-compose ps\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4. Run Migrations\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Apply database migrations\nnpm run migrate:up\n\n# Or manually:\ndocker exec -i dna_postgres psql -U dna -d dna_marketing &lt; migrations/1737475200000_initial-schema.sql\ndocker exec -i dna_postgres psql -U dna -d dna_marketing &lt; migrations/1737475200001_seed-pipelines.sql\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 5. Seed Data (Optional)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\nnpm run seed\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 6. Start Development\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Terminal 1: Start API server with hot reload\nnpm run dev\n\n# Terminal 2: Start background workers\nnpm run workers\n&#96;&#96;&#96;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "{\n  \"name\": \"dna-marketing-engine\",\n  \"version\": \"1.0.0\",\n  \"description\": \"DNA ME - Custom CRM Platform with Smart Routing &amp; Intent Detection\",\n  \"type\": \"module\",\n  \"main\": \"dist/index.js\",\n  \"scripts\": {\n    \"dev\": \"tsx watch src/index.ts\",\n    \"build\": \"tsc\",\n    \"start\": \"node dist/index.js\",\n    \"workers\": \"tsx src/workers/index.ts\",\n    \"dev:workers\": \"tsx watch src/workers/index.ts\",\n    \"migrate\": \"node-pg-migrate\",\n    \"migrate:up\": \"node-pg-migrate up\",\n    \"migrate:down\": \"node-pg-migrate down\",\n    \"migrate:create\": \"node-pg-migrate create\",\n    \"seed\": \"tsx src/db/seeds/run.ts\",\n    \"test\": \"vitest\",\n    \"test:e2e\": \"tsx scripts/test-e2e.ts\",\n    \"lint\": \"eslint src --ext .ts\",\n    \"typecheck\": \"tsc --noEmit\"\n  },\n  \"keywords\": [\n    \"crm\",\n    \"marketing\",\n    \"automation\",\n    \"lead-scoring\",\n    \"intent-detection\"\n  ],\n  \"author\": \"DNA ME\",\n  \"license\": \"UNLICENSED\",\n  \"engines\": {\n    \"node\": \"&gt;=20.0.0\"\n  },\n  \"dependencies\": {\n    \"@fastify/cors\": \"^9.0.1\",\n    \"@fastify/jwt\": \"^8.0.1\",\n    \"@fastify/rate-limit\": \"^9.1.0\",\n    \"@types/nodemailer\": \"^7.0.5\",\n    \"axios\": \"^1.6.7\",\n    \"bullmq\": \"^5.1.6\",\n    \"dayjs\": \"^1.11.10\",\n    \"dotenv\": \"^16.4.1\",\n    \"fastify\": \"^4.26.1\",\n    \"ioredis\": \"^5.3.2\",\n    \"node-pg-migrate\": \"^7.0.0\",\n    \"nodemailer\": \"^7.0.12\",\n    \"pg\": \"^8.11.3\",\n    \"pino\": \"^8.18.0\",\n    \"pino-pretty\": \"^10.3.1\",\n    \"uuid\": \"^9.0.1\",\n    \"zod\": \"^3.22.4\"\n  },\n  \"devDependencies\": {\n    \"@types/node\": \"^20.11.16\",\n    \"@types/pg\": \"^8.11.0\",\n    \"@types/uuid\": \"^9.0.8\",\n    \"tsx\": \"^4.7.0\",\n    \"typescript\": \"^5.3.3\",\n    \"vitest\": \"^1.2.2\"\n  }\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

        },
        "contents": "// =============================================================================\n// Schema Definition\n// =============================================================================\n\nconst configSchema = z.object({\n  // Server\n  port: z.coerce.number().default(3000),\n  host: z.string().default('0.0.0.0'),\n  nodeEnv: z.enum(['development', 'production', 'test']).default('development'),\n  logLevel: z.enum(['trace', 'debug', 'info', 'warn', 'error', 'fatal']).default('info'),\n\n  // Database (postgres:// URLs don't pass standard URL validation)\n  databaseUrl: z.string().startsWith('postgres'),\n\n  // Redis (redis:// URLs don't pass standard URL validation)\n  redisUrl: z.string().startsWith('redis'),\n\n  // Security\n  jwtSecret: z.string().min(32),\n  webhookSecret: z.string().min(16),\n  corsOrigin: z.string().optional(),\n\n  // API Keys (parsed from comma-separated string)\n  apiKeys: z.array(z.object({\n    key: z.string(),\n    source: z.string()\n  })).default([]),\n\n  // Moco Integration\n  moco: z.object({\n    apiKey: z.string().nullish(),\n    subdomain: z.string().nullish(),\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\n  }),\n\n  // Slack Integration\n  slack: z.object({\n    webhookUrl: z.string().url().nullish(),\n    botToken: z.string().nullish(),\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\n  }),\n\n  // Cituro Integration\n  cituro: z.object({\n    apiKey: z.string().nullish(),\n    subdomain: z.string().nullish(),\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\n  }),\n\n  // SMTP Configuration\n  smtp: z.object({\n    host: z.string().nullish(),\n    port: z.coerce.number().default(587),\n    user: z.string().nullish(),\n    pass: z.string().nullish(),\n    secure: z.boolean().default(false),\n    from: z.string().nullish(),\n    fromName: z.string().default('DNA ME'),\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\n  }),\n\n  // Feature Flags\n  features: z.object({\n    mocoSync: z.boolean().default(false),\n    slackAlerts: z.boolean().default(false),\n    scoreDecay: z.boolean().default(true)\n  }),\n\n  // Rate Limiting\n  rateLimit: z.object({\n    max: z.coerce.number().default(100),\n    timeWindow: z.coerce.number().default(60000)\n  })\n});\n\nexport type Config = z.infer&lt;typeof configSchema&gt;;",

        "contents": "version: '3.8'\n\nservices:\n  postgres:\n    image: postgres:15-alpine\n    container_name: dna_postgres\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_DB: dna_marketing\n      POSTGRES_USER: dna\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-devpassword}\n    volumes:\n      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data\n    ports:\n      - \"5432:5432\"\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U dna -d dna_marketing\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n    networks:\n      - dna_network\n\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7-alpine\n    container_name: dna_redis\n    command: redis-server --appendonly yes\n    ports:\n      - \"6379:6379\"\n    volumes:\n      - redis_data:/data\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"redis-cli\", \"ping\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n    networks:\n      - dna_network\n\n  # Uncomment for production deployment\n  # api:\n  #   build:\n  #     context: .\n  #     dockerfile: Dockerfile\n  #   container_name: dna_api\n  #   environment:\n  #     NODE_ENV: production\n  #     PORT: 3000\n  #     DATABASE_URL: postgres://dna:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-devpassword}@postgres:5432/dna_marketing\n  #     REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379\n  #     MOCO_API_KEY: ${MOCO_API_KEY}\n  #     MOCO_SUBDOMAIN: ${MOCO_SUBDOMAIN}\n  #     SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}\n  #     WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${WEBHOOK_SECRET}\n  #     JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET}\n  #   ports:\n  #     - \"3000:3000\"\n  #   depends_on:\n  #     postgres:\n  #       condition: service_healthy\n  #     redis:\n  #       condition: service_healthy\n  #   restart: unless-stopped\n  #   networks:\n  #     - dna_network\n\n  workers:\n    ",

        "contents": "# DNA ME CRM — Final AWS Deployment Plan\n\nMerged from Plans b0ab4d72 and b742a208 with expert review upgrades.\n\n## Summary\n\n| Aspect | Implementation |\n|--------|----------------|\n| **EC2** | 2× t3.medium (App + DB) |\n| **Region** | eu-central-1 |\n| **VPC** | 10.0.0.0/16, public subnet only (no NAT) |\n| **DB** | Public subnet, Public IP, SG-restricted (5432 from App, 22 from AllowedCidr) |\n| **EBS** | DB volume DeleteOnTermination: false |\n| **Backup** | Cron 3 AM, local + S3 (IAM role) |\n| **AllowedCidr** | Default 1.1.1.1/32 (change to your IP) |\n| **Docker Compose** | Pinned v2.29.1 |\n\n## Architecture\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nInternet → Elastic IP → App EC2 (t3.medium)\n                         ├── Nginx (80/443) + Certbot\n                         ├── API (:3000)\n                         ├── Workers\n                         ├── Frontend (Nginx SPA)\n                         └── Redis (:6379)\n                              │ DATABASE_URL=postgres://...@&lt;DB_IP&gt;:5432/...\n                              ▼\n                         DB EC2 (t3.medium, private subnet)\n                         └── Postgres (:5432) in Docker\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Deploy Sequence (deploy-aws.sh)\n\n1. Fetch AppPublicIP and DbPrivateIP from CloudFormation\n2. Deploy to DB instance first (direct SSH via DbPublicIP or ProxyJump)\n3. Wait 45s for Postgres to become healthy\n4. Deploy to App instance (migrate, then docker compose)\n5. Health check\n\n## Files Created\n\n| File | Purpose |\n|------|---------|\n| &#96;cloudformation.yaml&#96; | VPC, Subnet, IGW, SG, EC2, EIP, User Data |\n| &#96;docker-compose.aws.yml&#96; | All services, Certbot SSL |\n| &#96;nginx-aws.conf&#96; | Reverse proxy (HTTP→HTTPS, Frontend, API) |\n| &#96;nginx-aws.conf.template&#96; | Domain placeholder for custom domains |\n| &#96;Dockerfile.nginx-certbot&#96; | Nginx + Certbot image |\n| &#96;entrypoint-nginx-certbot.sh&#96; | SSL init + renewal loop |\n| &#96;init-letsencrypt.sh&#96; | Dummy certs helper |\n| &#96;backup.sh&#96; | pg_dump cron script |\n| &#96;user-data.sh&#96; | EC2 bootstrap (standalone reference) |\n| &#96;deploy-aws.sh&#96; | Build, upload, deploy |",

        "contents": "│   ├── workers/               # BullMQ background workers\n│   │   ├── eventWorker.ts     # Event processing\n│   │   ├── routingWorker.ts   # Lead routing\n│   │   ├── syncWorker.ts      # External sync (Moco/Slack)\n│   │   ├── decayWorker.ts     # Daily score decay\n│   │   └── index.ts           # Worker orchestration\n│   │\n│   ├── integrations/          # External service clients\n│   │   ├── moco.ts            # Moco API client\n│   │   └── slack.ts           # Slack notifications\n│   │\n│   ├── db/                    # Database layer\n│   │   ├── index.ts           # Connection pool\n│   │   └── seeds/             # Seed data scripts\n│   │\n│   ├── config/                # Configuration\n│   │   ├── index.ts           # Zod-validated config\n│   │   ├── redis.ts           # Redis connection\n│   │   ├── queues.ts          # BullMQ queues\n│   │   ├── scoringRules.ts    # Default scoring rules\n│   │   ├── intentRules.ts     # Intent detection rules\n│   │   └── routingConfig.ts   # Routing thresholds\n│   │\n│   ├── errors/                # Custom error classes\n│   ├── types/                 # TypeScript definitions\n│   └── index.ts               # Main entry point\n│\n├── migrations/                # Database migrations\n├── scripts/                   # Utility scripts\n│   ├── test-e2e.ts           # E2E test suite (TypeScript)\n│   └── test-e2e.sh           # E2E test suite (Shell)\n├── docker-compose.yml\n├── Dockerfile\n├── package.json\n├── tsconfig.json\n└── README.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## API Endpoints\n\n### Health &amp; Status\n\n| Method | Endpoint | Description |\n|--------|----------|-------------|\n| GET | &#96;/health&#96; | Full health check (DB + Redis) |\n| GET | &#96;/ready&#96; | Readiness probe |\n\n### Events",

        "contents": "# =============================================================================\n# DNA Marketing Engine - Environment Variables\n# Copy this file to .env and adjust values\n# =============================================================================\n\n# Database\nDATABASE_URL=postgres://dna:devpassword@localhost:5432/dna_marketing\nPOSTGRES_PASSWORD=devpassword\n\n# Redis\nREDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379\n\n# API Server\nPORT=3000\nHOST=0.0.0.0\nNODE_ENV=development\nLOG_LEVEL=debug\n\n# Security\nJWT_SECRET=your_jwt_secret_min_32_chars_change_in_production\nWEBHOOK_SECRET=your_webhook_hmac_secret_change_in_production\n\n# API Keys for Webhook Sources (comma-separated key:source pairs)\n# Format: key1:waalaxy,key2:lemlist,key3:portal\nAPI_KEYS=dev_key_waalaxy:waalaxy,dev_key_lemlist:lemlist,dev_key_portal:portal\n\n# Moco Integration (German Finance)\nMOCO_API_KEY=your_moco_api_key\nMOCO_SUBDOMAIN=your_company\nMOCO_TAX_RATE=0\nMOCO_INVOICE_DUE_DAYS=14\n\n# Slack Integration\nSLACK_WEBHOOK_URL=https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx/yyy/zzz\nSLACK_BOT_TOKEN=xoxb-xxx\n\n# Cituro Integration (Meeting Booking)\nCITURO_API_KEY=your_cituro_api_key\nCITURO_SUBDOMAIN=dna-me\n\n# SMTP Configuration (for Email Service)\nSMTP_HOST=smtp.example.com\nSMTP_PORT=587\nSMTP_USER=your_smtp_user\nSMTP_PASS=your_smtp_password\nSMTP_SECURE=false\nSMTP_FROM=info@dna-me.com\nSMTP_FROM_NAME=DNA ME\n\n# Feature Flags\nENABLE_MOCO_SYNC=false\nENABLE_SLACK_ALERTS=false\nENABLE_CITURO=false\nENABLE_SCORE_DECAY=true\n\n# Rate Limiting\nRATE_LIMIT_MAX=100\nRATE_LIMIT_TIME_WINDOW=60000",

        "contents": "npm run dev\n\n# Terminal 2: Start background workers\nnpm run workers\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThe server will be available at &#96;http://localhost:3000&#96;\n\n## Architecture\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\n│                           DNA Marketing Engine                           │\n├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤\n│                                                                         │\n│   ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐               │\n│   │   Waalaxy   │    │   Website   │    │   Lemlist   │    ...        │\n│   └──────┬──────┘    └──────┬──────┘    └──────┬──────┘               │\n│          │                  │                  │                       │\n│          └────────────┬─────┴─────┬────────────┘                       │\n│                       ▼           ▼                                    │\n│              ┌────────────────────────────┐                           │\n│              │   Event Ingestion API      │                           │\n│              │   POST /api/v1/events      │                           │\n│              └────────────┬───────────────┘                           │\n│                           │                                           │\n│                           ▼                                           │",
        "signatures": {},

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "// =============================================================================\n// Worker Registry\n// =============================================================================\n\nconst workers: Worker[] = [];\n\n// =============================================================================\n// Initialize Workers\n// =============================================================================\n\nasync function initializeWorkers() {\n  console.log('Initializing workers...');\n\n  // Initialize Redis connection\n  getRedisConnection();\n  console.log('✅ Redis connected');\n\n  // Initialize Scoring Engine and load rules\n  const scoringEngine = getScoringEngine();\n  await scoringEngine.loadRules();\n  console.log('✅ Scoring Engine initialized');\n\n  // Initialize Intent Detector\n  const intentDetector = getIntentDetector();\n  await intentDetector.initialize();\n  console.log('✅ Intent Detector initialized');\n\n  // Initialize Automation Engine\n  const automationEngine = getAutomationEngine();\n  await automationEngine.loadRules();\n  console.log(&#96;✅ Automation Engine initialized (${automationEngine.getRulesCount()} rules loaded)&#96;);\n\n  // Event Worker - processes incoming marketing events\n  const eventWorker = createEventWorker(scoringEngine, intentDetector, automationEngine);\n  workers.push(eventWorker);\n  console.log('✅ Event Worker started (concurrency: 10, with Scoring + Intent + Automation)');\n\n  // Initialize Pipeline Router\n  const pipelineRouter = getPipelineRouter();\n  console.log('✅ Pipeline Router initialized');\n\n  // Routing Worker - evaluates and routes leads to pipelines\n  const routingWorker = createRoutingWorker(pipelineRouter);\n  workers.push(routingWorker);\n  console.log('✅ Routing Worker started (concurrency: 5)');\n\n  // Initialize Moco Service\n  const mocoService = getMocoService();\n  if (mocoService.isConfigured()) {\n    console.log('✅ Moco Service initialized');\n}",

        "contents": "#!/bin/bash\n# =============================================================================\n# DNA ME CRM — Server-side deploy script\n# Run this on LXC 101 (App container) after uploading release.tar.gz\n# =============================================================================\n\nset -e\n\nAPP_DIR=\"/opt/dna-crm\"\nRELEASE_FILE=\"$APP_DIR/release.tar.gz\"\n\nif [ ! -f \"$RELEASE_FILE\" ]; then\n  echo \"ERROR: $RELEASE_FILE not found!\"\n  echo \"Upload it first: scp release.tar.gz root@10.10.10.2:$APP_DIR/\"\n  exit 1\nfi\n\necho \"=== Extracting release ===\"\ncd $APP_DIR\ntar -xzf release.tar.gz\n\necho \"=== Running database migrations ===\"\n# Install node for migrations (one-time)\nif ! command -v node &amp;&gt; /dev/null; then\n  curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash -\n  apt-get install -y nodejs\nfi\nnpm run migrate:up\n\necho \"=== Building and starting Docker containers ===\"\ndocker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --build\n\necho \"=== Waiting for health check ===\"\nsleep 10\nif curl -sf http://localhost:3000/health &gt; /dev/null; then\n  echo \"API is healthy!\"\nelse\n  echo \"WARNING: Health check failed. Check logs:\"\n  echo \"  docker logs dna_api\"\nfi\n\necho \"=== Cleaning up ===\"\nrm -f $RELEASE_FILE\n\necho \"\"\necho \"Deploy complete!\"\necho \"  API:      http://localhost:3000\"\necho \"  Frontend: http://localhost:8080\"\necho \"\"\necho \"Useful commands:\"\necho \"  docker logs -f dna_api       # API logs\"\necho \"  docker logs -f dna_workers   # Worker logs\"\necho \"  docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml ps\"",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "contents": "# =============================================================================\n# DNA Marketing Engine - Dockerfile\n# Multi-stage build for production\n# =============================================================================\n\n# Stage 1: Build\nFROM node:20-alpine AS builder\n\nWORKDIR /app\n\n# Install dependencies first (for layer caching)\nCOPY package*.json ./\nRUN npm ci\n\n# Copy source and build\nCOPY tsconfig.json ./\nCOPY src ./src\nRUN npm run build\n\n# Stage 2: Production\nFROM node:20-alpine AS runner\n\nWORKDIR /app\n\n# Set production environment\nENV NODE_ENV=production\n\n# Copy package files and install production deps only\nCOPY --from=builder /app/package*.json ./\nRUN npm ci --only=production &amp;&amp; npm cache clean --force\n\n# Copy built application\nCOPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist\n\n# Create non-root user for security\nRUN addgroup --system --gid 1001 nodejs &amp;&amp; \\\n    adduser --system --uid 1001 dna\nUSER dna\n\n# Expose port\nEXPOSE 3000\n\n# Health check\nHEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \\\n    CMD wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:3000/health || exit 1\n\n# Start application\nCMD [\"node\", \"dist/index.js\"]",

        "contents": "// =============================================================================\n// Load and Validate Configuration\n// =============================================================================\n\nfunction loadConfig(): Config {\n  const rawConfig = {\n    port: process.env.PORT,\n    host: process.env.HOST,\n    nodeEnv: process.env.NODE_ENV,\n    logLevel: process.env.LOG_LEVEL,\n    databaseUrl: process.env.DATABASE_URL,\n    redisUrl: process.env.REDIS_URL,\n    jwtSecret: process.env.JWT_SECRET,\n    webhookSecret: process.env.WEBHOOK_SECRET,\n    corsOrigin: process.env.CORS_ORIGIN || undefined,\n    apiKeys: parseApiKeys(process.env.API_KEYS),\n    moco: {\n      apiKey: process.env.MOCO_API_KEY || undefined,\n      subdomain: process.env.MOCO_SUBDOMAIN || process.env.MOCO_ACCOUNT_ID || undefined,\n      enabled: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_MOCO_SYNC, false)\n    },\n    slack: {\n      webhookUrl: process.env.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL || undefined,\n      botToken: process.env.SLACK_BOT_TOKEN || undefined,\n      enabled: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_SLACK_ALERTS, false)\n    },\n    cituro: {\n      apiKey: process.env.CITURO_API_KEY || undefined,\n      subdomain: process.env.CITURO_SUBDOMAIN || undefined,\n      enabled: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_CITURO, false)\n    },\n    smtp: {\n      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST || undefined,\n      port: process.env.SMTP_PORT,\n      user: process.env.SMTP_USER || undefined,\n      pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS || undefined,\n      secure: parseBoolean(process.env.SMTP_SECURE, false),\n      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM || undefined,\n      fromName: process.env.SMTP_FROM_NAME || 'DNA ME',\n      enabled: !!(process.env.SMTP_HOST &amp;&amp; process.env.SMTP_USER &amp;&amp; process.env.SMTP_PASS)\n    },\n    features: {\n      mocoSync: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_MOCO_SYNC, false),\n      slackAlerts: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_SLACK_ALERTS, false),\n      scoreDecay: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_SCORE_DECAY, true)\n    },\n    rateLimit: {\n      max: process.env.RATE_LIMIT_MAX,\n      timeWindow: process.env.RATE_LIMIT_TIME_WINDOW\n    }\n  };\n\n  const result = configSchema.safeParse(rawConfig);\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\deploy\\nginx-proxy.conf",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 47
          }
        },
        "contents": "# Nginx reverse proxy config for LXC 100\n# Install: apt install nginx certbot python3-certbot-nginx\n\nserver {\n    listen 80;\n    server_name crm.dna-me.com;\n    return 301 https://$host$request_uri;\n}\n\nserver {\n    listen 443 ssl http2;\n    server_name crm.dna-me.com;\n\n    ssl_certificate     /etc/letsencrypt/live/crm.dna-me.com/fullchain.pem;\n    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/crm.dna-me.com/privkey.pem;\n    ssl_protocols       TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;\n    ssl_ciphers         HIGH:!aNULL:!MD5;\n\n    client_max_body_size 10M;\n\n    # Frontend\n    location / {\n        proxy_pass http://10.10.10.2:8080;\n        proxy_set_header Host $host;\n        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;\n        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;\n        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;\n    }\n\n    # Backend API\n    location /api/ {\n        proxy_pass http://10.10.10.2:3000;\n        proxy_set_header Host $host;\n        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;\n        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;\n        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;\n    }\n\n    # Health check\n    location /health {\n        proxy_pass http://10.10.10.2:3000/health;\n    }\n\n    location /ready {\n        proxy_pass http://10.10.10.2:3000/ready;\n    }\n}",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "services:\n  postgres:\n    image: postgres:15-alpine\n    container_name: dna_postgres\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_DB: dna_marketing\n      POSTGRES_USER: dna\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-devpassword}\n    volumes:\n      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data\n      - ./src/db/migrations:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d\n    ports:\n      - \"5432:5432\"\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U dna -d dna_marketing\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7-alpine\n    container_name: dna_redis\n    ports:\n      - \"6379:6379\"\n    volumes:\n      - redis_data:/data\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"redis-cli\", \"ping\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n\n  api:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile\n    container_name: dna_api\n    environment:\n      NODE_ENV: production\n      PORT: 3000\n      DATABASE_URL: postgres://dna:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-devpassword}@postgres:5432/dna_marketing\n      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379\n      MOCO_API_KEY: ${MOCO_API_KEY}\n      MOCO_SUBDOMAIN: ${MOCO_SUBDOMAIN}\n      SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}\n      WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${WEBHOOK_SECRET}\n      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET}\n    ports:\n      - \"3000:3000\"\n    depends_on:\n      postgres:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    restart: unless-stopped\n\n  workers:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile\n    container_name: dna_workers\n    command: [\"npm\", \"run\", \"workers\"]\n    environment:\n      NODE_ENV: production\n      DATABASE_URL: postgres://dna:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-devpassword}@postgres:5432/dna_marketing\n      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379\n      MOCO_API_KEY: ${MOCO_API_KEY}\n      MOCO_SUBDOMAIN: ${MOCO_SUBDOMAIN}\n      SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}\n    depends_on:\n      postgres:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      ",

        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 54
          }
        },
        "contents": "version: '3.8'\n\n# Production docker-compose for DNA ME CRM\n# Runs on LXC 101 (App container)\n# PostgreSQL and Redis run natively on separate LXCs\n\nservices:\n  api:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile\n    container_name: dna_api\n    env_file: .env.production\n    ports:\n      - \"3000:3000\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"wget\", \"--no-verbose\", \"--tries=1\", \"--spider\", \"http://localhost:3000/health\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      start_period: 10s\n      retries: 3\n    networks:\n      - dna_network\n\n  workers:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile\n    container_name: dna_workers\n    command: [\"npm\", \"run\", \"workers\"]\n    env_file: .env.production\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    depends_on:\n      api:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    networks:\n      - dna_network\n\n  frontend:\n    image: nginx:alpine\n    container_name: dna_frontend\n    volumes:\n      - ./frontend/dist:/usr/share/nginx/html:ro\n      - ./deploy/frontend-nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro\n    ports:\n      - \"8080:80\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    networks:\n      - dna_network\n\nnetworks:\n  dna_network:\n    driver: bridge",

        "contents": "// =============================================================================\n// Database Stats Endpoint (Development only)\n// =============================================================================\n\nif (isDev) {\n  fastify.get('/debug/db-stats', async () =&gt; {\n    return {\n      pool: db.getStats(),\n      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n    };\n  });\n}\n\n// =============================================================================\n// Root Endpoint\n// =============================================================================\n\nfastify.get('/', async () =&gt; {\n  return {\n    name: 'DNA Marketing Engine',\n    version: '1.0.0',\n    status: 'running',\n    docs: '/docs',\n    health: '/health'\n  };\n});\n\n// =============================================================================",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\src\\workers\\index.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 133,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "async function initializeWorkers() {\n\n  if (mocoService.isConfigured()) {\n    console.log('✅ Moco Service initialized');\n  } else {\n    console.log('⚠️ Moco Service not configured (missing API key or subdomain)');\n  }\n\n  // Initialize Slack Service\n  const slackService = getSlackService();\n  if (slackService.isConfigured()) {\n    console.log('✅ Slack Service initialized');\n  } else {\n    console.log('⚠️ Slack Service not configured (missing webhook URL)');\n  }\n\n  // Sync Worker - handles Moco and Slack synchronization\n  const syncWorker = createSyncWorker(mocoService, slackService);\n  workers.push(syncWorker);\n  console.log('✅ Sync Worker started (concurrency: 3, rate limit: 10/sec)');\n\n  // Decay Worker - handles daily score decay\n  if (config.features.scoreDecay) {\n    const decayWorker = createDecayWorker();\n    workers.push(decayWorker);\n    await setupDecayJob();\n    console.log('✅ Decay Worker started (scheduled: 2:00 AM daily)');\n  } else {\n    console.log('⚠️ Decay Worker disabled (ENABLE_SCORE_DECAY=false)');\n  }\n\n  // Daily Digest Worker - sends daily marketing stats to Slack\n  if (config.features.slackAlerts &amp;&amp; slackService.isConfigured()) {\n    const dailyDigestWorker = createDailyDigestWorker();\n    workers.push(dailyDigestWorker);\n    await setupDailyDigestJob();\n    console.log('✅ Daily Digest Worker started (scheduled: 8:00 AM daily)');\n  } else {\n    console.log('⚠️ Daily Digest Worker disabled (Slack not configured or ENABLE_SLACK_ALERTS=false)');\n  }\n\n  // Email Sequence Worker - processes email sequences\n  const emailService = getEmailService();\n  if (emailService.checkConfiguration()) {\n    const emailSequenceWorker = createEmailSequenceWorker();\n    workers.push(emailSequenceWorker);\n    await setupEmailSequenceJob();\n    console.log('✅ Email Sequence Worker started (scheduled: every 15 minutes)');\n  } else {\n    console.log('⚠️ Email Sequence Worker disabled (SMTP not configured)');\n  }\n\n  console.log(&#96;✅ ${workers.length} worker(s) initialized&#96;);\n  console.log('Workers are ready and waiting for jobs...');\n}",
        "signatures": {

        VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n    first_name      VARCHAR(100),\n    last_name       VARCHAR(100),\n    phone           VARCHAR(50),\n    job_title       VARCHAR(150),\n    organization_id           },
          {
            "text": "    demographic_score   INTEGER DEFAULT 0,",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "    engagement_score    INTEGER DEFAULT 0,",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "    behavior_score      INTEGER DEFAULT 0,",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    total_score         INTEGER GENERATED ALWAYS AS ",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "                        (demographic_score + engagement_score + behavior_score) STORED,",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",

          },
          {
            "text": "    -- SMART ROUTING (CRITICAL!)",

          },
          {
            "text": "    pipeline_id         UUID REFERENCES pipelines(id),",

          {

          },

        "contents": "CREATE TABLE automation_logs (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    rule_id         UUID REFERENCES automation_rules(id),\n    lead_id         UUID REFERENCES leads(id),\n    deal_id         UUID REFERENCES deals(id),\n    trigger_data    JSONB,\n    action_result   JSONB,\n    success         BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\n    error_message   TEXT,\n    executed_at     TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- TASKS\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE tasks (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    lead_id         UUID REFERENCES leads(id),\n    deal_id         UUID REFERENCES deals(id),\n    title           VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    description     TEXT,\n    task_type       VARCHAR(50),\n    assigned_to     VARCHAR(255),\n    due_date        TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    completed_at    TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    status          VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'open',\n    automation_rule_id UUID REFERENCES automation_rules(id),\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- TEAM MEMBERS\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE team_members (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    email           VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    role            VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,\n    region          VARCHAR(50),\n    is_active       BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\n    max_leads       INTEGER DEFAULT 50,\n    current_leads   INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- CAMPAIGNS\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE campaigns (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),",

        "contents": "-- =============================================================================\n-- DNA Marketing Engine - Initial Schema Migration\n-- PostgreSQL 15+\n-- =============================================================================\n\n-- Enable UUID extension\nCREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS \"uuid-ossp\";\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- ORGANIZATIONS\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE organizations (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    domain          VARCHAR(255),\n    industry        VARCHAR(100),\n    company_size    VARCHAR(50),\n    country         VARCHAR(2),\n    portal_id       VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,\n    moco_id         VARCHAR(50),\n    metadata        JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- PIPELINES\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE pipelines (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    slug            VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    description     TEXT,\n    is_active       BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\n    is_default      BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,\n    sales_cycle_days INTEGER,\n    target_persona  VARCHAR(255),\n    config          JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- PIPELINE STAGES\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE pipeline_stages (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),",

        "contents": "chmod +x scripts/test-e2e.sh\n./scripts/test-e2e.sh\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Manual API Testing\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Health check\ncurl http://localhost:3000/health\n\n# Ingest an event\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/v1/events/ingest \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -H \"X-API-Key: portal:key2\" \\\n  -d '{\n    \"event_type\": \"page_visited\",\n    \"source\": \"portal\",\n    \"occurred_at\": \"2026-01-21T12:00:00Z\",\n    \"lead_identifier\": {\"email\": \"test@example.com\"},\n    \"metadata\": {\"page_path\": \"/pricing\"}\n  }'\n\n# List leads\ncurl http://localhost:3000/api/v1/leads \\\n  -H \"X-API-Key: portal:key2\"\n\n# Get lead details\ncurl http://localhost:3000/api/v1/leads/&lt;lead-id&gt; \\\n  -H \"X-API-Key: portal:key2\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Database Schema\n\nThe CRM uses the following main tables:\n\n| Table | Description |\n|-------|-------------|\n| &#96;leads&#96; | Contact information, scores, and routing status |\n| &#96;organizations&#96; | Company data linked to leads |\n| &#96;pipelines&#96; | Sales pipelines (Research, B2B, Co-Creation, Discovery) |\n| &#96;pipeline_stages&#96; | Stages within each pipeline |\n| &#96;deals&#96; | Opportunities linked to leads and pipelines |\n| &#96;events&#96; | Marketing events (partitioned by month) |\n| &#96;intent_signals&#96; | Detected intent signals for leads |\n| &#96;scoring_rules&#96; | Configurable score calculation rules |\n| &#96;score_history&#96; | Historical score changes with decay |\n| &#96;automation_rules&#96; | Automation triggers and actions |\n| &#96;tasks&#96; | Follow-up tasks for team members |\n| &#96;team_members&#96; | Sales team members with capacity |\n| &#96;campaigns&#96; | Marketing campaign tracking |\n| &#96;api_keys&#96; | Webhook authentication keys |\n\n## Docker Deployment\n\n### Development\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ndocker-compose up -d\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Production\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ndocker-compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d api workers\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Integrations\n\n### Moco (German Finance)\n\nThe Moco integration enables:\n- Customer creation when deals are won\n- Offer/quote generation\n- Invoice creation from offers\n\nConfigure by setting &#96;MOCO_API_KEY&#96; and &#96;MOCO_SUBDOMAIN&#96; in your &#96;.env&#96; file.\n\n### Slack\n\nThe Slack integration provides:\n- Hot lead alerts (#hot-leads)",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "chmod +x scripts/test-e2e.sh",
            "lineNumber": 343
          },
          {
            "text": "./scripts/test-e2e.sh",
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "text": "### Manual API Testing",
            "lineNumber": 347
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "text": "# Health check",
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "text": "curl http://localhost:3000/health",
            "lineNumber": 351
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "text": "# Ingest an event",
            "lineNumber": 353
          },
          {
            "text": "curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/v1/events/ingest \\",
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "text": "  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\",
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "text": "  -H \"X-API-Key: portal:key2\" \\",
            "lineNumber": 356
          },
          {
            "text": "  -d '{",
            "lineNumber": 357
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"event_type\": \"page_visited\",",
            "lineNumber": 358
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"source\": \"portal\",",
            "lineNumber": 359
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"occurred_at\": \"2026-01-21T12:00:00Z\",",
            "lineNumber": 360
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"lead_identifier\": {\"email\": \"test@example.com\"},",
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"metadata\": {\"page_path\": \"/pricing\"}",
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "text": "  }'",
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "text": "# List leads",
            "lineNumber": 365
          },
          {
            "text": "curl http://localhost:3000/api/v1/leads \\",
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "text": "  -H \"X-API-Key: portal:key2\"",
            "lineNumber": 367
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {
            "text": "# Get lead details",
            "lineNumber": 369
          },
          {
            "text": "curl http://localhost:3000/api/v1/leads/&lt;lead-id&gt; \\",
            "lineNumber": 370
          },
          {
            "text": "  -H \"X-API-Key: portal:key2\"",
            "lineNumber": 371
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373
          },
          {
            "text": "## Database Schema",
            "lineNumber": 374
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375
          },
          {
            "text": "The CRM uses the following main tables:",
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "text": "| Table | Description |",
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "text": "|-------|-------------|",
            "lineNumber": 379
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;leads&#96; | Contact information, scores, and routing status |",
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;organizations&#96; | Company data linked to leads |",
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;pipelines&#96; | Sales pipelines (Research, B2B, Co-Creation, Discovery) |",
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;pipeline_stages&#96; | Stages within each pipeline |",
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;deals&#96; | Opportunities linked to leads and pipelines |",
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;events&#96; | Marketing events (partitioned by month) |",
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;intent_signals&#96; | Detected intent signals for leads |",
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;scoring_rules&#96; | Configurable score calculation rules |",
            "lineNumber": 387
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;score_history&#96; | Historical score changes with decay |",
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;automation_rules&#96; | Automation triggers and actions |",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;tasks&#96; | Follow-up tasks for team members |",
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;api_keys&#96; | Webhook authentication keys |",
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394
          },
          {
            "text": "## Docker Deployment",
            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396

          {
            "text": "### Development",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398

          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 399
          },
          {

          },

          {

          },
          {

            "text": "### Moco (German Finance)",
            "lineNumber": 411

          {
            "lineNumber": 412

          {
            "text": "The Moco integration enables:",

        "contents": "CREATE TABLE deals (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    lead_id         UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES leads(id),\n    pipeline_id     UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pipelines(id),\n    stage_id        UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pipeline_stages(id),\n    name            VARCHAR(255),\n    value           DECIMAL(12,2),\n    currency        VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR',\n    expected_close_date DATE,\n    stage_entered_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    assigned_to         VARCHAR(255),\n    assigned_region     VARCHAR(50),\n    assigned_at         TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    status          VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'open',\n    close_reason    TEXT,\n    closed_at       TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    moco_offer_id   VARCHAR(50),\n    metadata        JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    UNIQUE(lead_id, pipeline_id)\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- EVENTS (Partitioned by month)\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE events (\n    id              UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    lead_id         UUID REFERENCES leads(id),\n    event_type      VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,\n    event_category  VARCHAR(50),\n    source          VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,\n    occurred_at     TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,\n    metadata        JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\n    campaign_id     VARCHAR(100),\n    utm_source      VARCHAR(100),\n    utm_medium      VARCHAR(100),\n    utm_campaign    VARCHAR(100),\n    correlation_id  UUID,\n    score_points    INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    score_category  VARCHAR(50),\n    processed_at    TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    PRIMARY KEY (id, occurred_at)\n) PARTITION BY RANGE (occurred_at);\n\n-- Create monthly partitions for 2026\nCREATE TABLE events_2026_01 PARTITION OF events FOR VALUES FROM ('2026-01-01') TO ('2026-02-01');\nCREATE TABLE events_2026_02 PARTITION OF events FOR VALUES FROM ('2026-02-01') TO ('2026-03-01');\nCREATE TABLE events_2026_03 PARTITION OF events FOR VALUES FROM ('2026-03-01') TO ('2026-04-01');",

        "contents": "CREATE TABLE email_sequence_enrollments (\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    lead_id             UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES leads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    sequence_id         UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES email_sequences(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    current_step        INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    status              VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'active',  -- active, paused, completed, unsubscribed\n    enrolled_at         TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    last_email_sent_at  TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    next_email_due_at   TIMESTAMPTZ,                   -- Wann die nächste E-Mail gesendet werden soll\n    completed_at        TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    unsubscribed_at     TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    metadata            JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    UNIQUE(lead_id, sequence_id)\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- EMAIL TRACKING (für Opens und Clicks)\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE email_tracking (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    enrollment_id   UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES email_sequence_enrollments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    step_id         UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES email_sequence_steps(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    sent_at         TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    opened_at       TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    open_count      INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    clicked_at      TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    click_count     INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    bounced_at      TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    bounce_reason   TEXT,\n    unsubscribed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    metadata        JSONB DEFAULT '{}'\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- INDEXES\n-- =============================================================================\n\n-- Email sequences indexes\nCREATE INDEX idx_email_sequences_active ON email_sequences(is_active) WHERE is_active = TRUE;\nCREATE INDEX idx_email_sequences_trigger ON email_sequences(trigger_event);",

        "contents": "CREATE TABLE pipeline_stages (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    pipeline_id     UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pipelines(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    slug            VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    position        INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    stage_type      VARCHAR(50),\n    automation_config JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    UNIQUE(pipeline_id, slug),\n    UNIQUE(pipeline_id, position)\n);\n\n-- LEADS (with Smart Routing fields)\nCREATE TABLE leads (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    \n    -- Identity\n    email           VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n    first_name      VARCHAR(100),\n    last_name       VARCHAR(100),\n    phone           VARCHAR(50),\n    job_title       VARCHAR(150),\n    organization_id UUID REFERENCES organizations(id),\n    \n    -- Status\n    status          VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'new',\n    lifecycle_stage VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'lead',\n    \n    -- SCORING\n    demographic_score   INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    engagement_score    INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    behavior_score      INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    total_score         INTEGER GENERATED ALWAYS AS \n                        (demographic_score + engagement_score + behavior_score) STORED,\n    \n    -- SMART ROUTING (CRITICAL!)\n    pipeline_id         UUID REFERENCES pipelines(id),  -- NULL = Global Pool\n    routing_status      VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'unrouted',\n    routed_at           TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    primary_intent      VARCHAR(50),    -- 'research', 'b2b', 'co_creation'\n    intent_confidence   INTEGER DEFAULT 0,  -- 0-100\n    intent_summary      JSONB DEFAULT '{\"research\":0,\"b2b\":0,\"co_creation\":0}',\n    \n    -- Attribution\n    first_touch_source      VARCHAR(100),\n    first_touch_campaign    VARCHAR(100),\n    first_touch_date        TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    last_touch_source       VARCHAR(100),\n    last_touch_campaign     VARCHAR(100),\n    last_touch_date         TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    \n    -- External IDs\n    portal_id           VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,\n    waalaxy_id          VARCHAR(100),\n    linkedin_url        VARCHAR(255),",

        "contents": "CREATE TABLE team_members (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    email           VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    role            VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,\n    region          VARCHAR(50),\n    is_active       BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\n    max_leads       INTEGER DEFAULT 50,\n    current_leads   INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- CAMPAIGNS\nCREATE TABLE campaigns (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    campaign_type   VARCHAR(50),\n    status          VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'draft',\n    budget          DECIMAL(10,2),\n    spent           DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,\n    currency        VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR',\n    utm_source      VARCHAR(100),\n    utm_medium      VARCHAR(100),\n    utm_campaign    VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,\n    start_date      DATE,\n    end_date        DATE,\n    leads_generated INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    deals_created   INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    revenue_attributed DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,\n    metadata        JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- INDEXES\nCREATE INDEX idx_leads_total_score ON leads(total_score DESC);\nCREATE INDEX idx_leads_routing_status ON  UPDATE leads SET\n        ",

        "contents": "└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n# 2. DATABASE SCHEMA\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sql\n-- ============================================================================\n-- COMPLETE SCHEMA FOR DNA MARKETING ENGINE\n-- PostgreSQL 15+\n-- ============================================================================\n\nCREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS \"uuid-ossp\";\n\n-- ORGANIZATIONS\nCREATE TABLE organizations (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    domain          VARCHAR(255),\n    industry        VARCHAR(100),\n    company_size    VARCHAR(50),\n    country         VARCHAR(2),\n    portal_id       VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,\n    moco_id         VARCHAR(50),\n    metadata        JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- PIPELINES\nCREATE TABLE pipelines (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    slug            VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    description     TEXT,\n    is_active       BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\n    is_default      BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,\n    sales_cycle_days INTEGER,\n    target_persona  VARCHAR(255),\n    config          JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- PIPELINE STAGES\nCREATE TABLE pipeline_stages (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\deploy\\aws\\README.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 126
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 185
          }
        },
        "contents": "**Nur App-Deploy (Stack muss existieren):**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\nbash deploy/aws/deploy-aws-ssm.sh\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nInteraktiver Zugriff: &#96;aws ssm start-session --target &lt;InstanceId&gt;&#96;\n\n### DNS einrichten\n\n**PowerShell (Route53 oder Anleitung):**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;powershell\n.\\deploy\\aws\\setup-dns.ps1\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Manuell:** Siehe &#96;deploy/aws/DNS-SETUP.md&#96;\n\n## Files\n\n| File | Purpose |\n|------|---------|\n| &#96;cloudformation.yaml&#96; | VPC, 2 EC2 (App + DB), SG, EIP — mit SSH |\n| &#96;cloudformation-ssm.yaml&#96; | Wie oben, aber ohne SSH, mit SSM + S3 Deploy |\n| &#96;Deploy-Stack.ps1&#96; | PowerShell: CloudFormation Stack automatisiert deployen |\n| &#96;deploy-aws-ssm.sh&#96; | Deploy via SSM (kein SSH) |\n| &#96;deploy-full.sh&#96; | Vollautomatisch: Stack + SSM-Warte + Deploy |\n| &#96;Deploy-Stack-SSM.ps1&#96; | PowerShell: SSM-Stack erstellen |\n| &#96;docker-compose.aws.yml&#96; | App services (Redis, Nginx, Certbot, API, Workers, Frontend) |\n| &#96;docker-compose.db.yml&#96; | DB instance: Postgres only |\n| &#96;nginx-aws.conf&#96; | Reverse proxy + SSL |\n| &#96;Dockerfile.nginx-certbot&#96; | Nginx + Certbot for automated SSL |\n| &#96;init-letsencrypt.sh&#96; | Dummy certs before first Let's Encrypt run |\n| &#96;backup.sh&#96; | &#96;pg_dump&#96; to local volume + S3 upload (cron 3 AM) |\n| &#96;deploy-aws.sh&#96; | Build, pack, upload, deploy |\n| &#96;.env.aws.example&#96; | Environment template |\n\n## Security\n\n- **SSH (22)**: Restricted to &#96;AllowedCidr&#96; (default 1.1.1.1/32 — change to your IP)\n- **DB (5432)**: Only from App instance\n- **DB (22)**: From AllowedCidr for deploy\n- **HTTP (80)**: Open (Certbot ACME, redirect to HTTPS)\n- **HTTPS (443)**: Open\n\n## Backup\n\n- **Local**: Daily at 3 AM to &#96;/opt/dna-crm/backups/&#96;, keep 30 days\n- **S3**: Set &#96;S3BackupBucket&#96; parameter when creating stack. IAM role grants &#96;s3:PutObject&#96; to &#96;s3://bucket/backups/*&#96;\n- **Cron**: Activated in CloudFormation UserData: &#96;crontab -u ec2-user&#96;\n\n## Migration to Proxmox\n\n1. &#96;pg_dump&#96; the database\n2. Copy &#96;docker-compose.prod.yml&#96; or adapt &#96;docker-compose.aws.yml&#96; for Proxmox env\n3. Same Docker images, same env vars — no code changes\n\n## Code Fixes (Plan b0ab4d72)\n\n- **CORS**: &#96;src/index.ts&#96; reads &#96;CORS_ORIGIN&#96; from env",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\migrations\\1737475200000_initial-schema.sql",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 94
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 134
          }
        },
        "contents": "    last_touch_source       VARCHAR(100),\n    last_touch_campaign     VARCHAR(100),\n    last_touch_date         TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    \n    -- External IDs\n    portal_id           VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,\n    waalaxy_id          VARCHAR(100),\n    linkedin_url        VARCHAR(255),\n    lemlist_id          VARCHAR(100),\n    \n    -- GDPR\n    consent_date            TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    consent_source          VARCHAR(100),\n    gdpr_delete_requested   TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    \n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    last_activity       TIMESTAMPTZ\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- INTENT SIGNALS (Key for Smart Routing!)\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE intent_signals (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    lead_id         UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES leads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    intent          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,\n    rule_id         VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,\n    confidence_points INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    trigger_type    VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,\n    event_id        UUID,\n    trigger_data    JSONB,\n    detected_at     TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- DEALS\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE deals (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\frontend\\src\\providers\\authProvider.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 73,
            "column": 28

        "contents": "/**\n * DNA ME CRM Auth Provider\n * \n * CRITICAL: Dev Mode - No Authentication\n * As per FRONTEND_PLAN.md: Skip all auth logic, assume user is always \"Admin\"\n */\n\nconst authProvider = {\n  // Dev Mode: Always succeeds, no actual login\n  login: async () =&gt; {\n    console.log('[Dev Mode] Auth bypassed - auto-login as Admin');\n    localStorage.setItem('auth_user', JSON.stringify({\n      id: 'dev-admin',\n      email: 'admin@dna-me.net',\n      fullName: 'Admin (Dev Mode)',\n      role: 'admin',\n    }));\n    return Promise.resolve();\n  },\n  \n  // Dev Mode: Clear stored user\n  logout: async () =&gt; {\n    localStorage.removeItem('auth_user');\n    return Promise.resolve();\n  },\n  \n  // Dev Mode: Always authenticated\n  checkAuth: async () =&gt; {\n    // In dev mode, auto-create user if not exists\n    if (!localStorage.getItem('auth_user')) {\n      localStorage.setItem('auth_user', JSON.stringify({\n        id: 'dev-admin',\n        email: 'admin@dna-me.net',\n        fullName: 'Admin (Dev Mode)',\n        role: 'admin',\n      }));\n    }\n    return Promise.resolve();\n  },\n  \n  // Dev Mode: Never show errors\n  checkError: async (error) =&gt; {\n    // Only reject on 401/403 in production\n    // In dev mode, ignore auth errors\n    console.log('[Dev Mode] API Error ignored:', error?.status);\n    return Promise.resolve();\n  },\n  \n  // Dev Mode: Return hardcoded admin identity\n  getIdentity: async () =&gt; {\n    const storedUser = localStorage.getItem('auth_user');\n    const user = storedUser \n      ? JSON.parse(storedUser)\n      : {\n          id: 'dev-admin',\n          email: 'admin@dna-me.net',\n          fullName: 'Admin (Dev Mode)',\n          role: 'admin',\n        };\n    \n    return {\n      id: user.id,\n      fullName: user.fullName,\n      avatar: undefined, // Could add a default avatar URL\n    };\n  },\n  \n  // Dev Mode: Full admin permissions\n  getPermissions: async () =&gt; {\n    return ['*']; // Full access for dev mode\n  },\n};\n\nexport default authProvider;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\deploy\\aws\\DEPLOYMENT_PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 54
          }
        },
        "contents": "# DNA ME CRM — Final AWS Deployment Plan\n\nMerged from Plans b0ab4d72 and b742a208 with expert review upgrades.\n\n## Summary\n\n| Aspect | Implementation |\n|--------|----------------|\n| **EC2** | 2× t3.medium (App + DB) |\n| **Region** | eu-central-1 |\n| **VPC** | 10.0.0.0/16, public subnet only (no NAT) |\n| **DB** | Public subnet, Public IP, SG-restricted (5432 from App, 22 from AllowedCidr) |\n| **EBS** | DB volume DeleteOnTermination: false |\n| **Backup** | Cron 3 AM, local + S3 (IAM role) |\n| **AllowedCidr** | Default 1.1.1.1/32 (change to your IP) |\n| **Docker Compose** | Pinned v2.29.1 |\n\n## Architecture\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nInternet → Elastic IP → App EC2 (t3.medium)\n                         ├── Nginx (80/443) + Certbot\n                         ├── API (:3000)\n                         ├── Workers\n                         ├── Frontend (Nginx SPA)\n                         └── Redis (:6379)\n                              │ DATABASE_URL=postgres://...@&lt;DB_IP&gt;:5432/...\n                              ▼\n                         DB EC2 (t3.medium, private subnet)\n                         └── Postgres (:5432) in Docker\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Deploy Sequence (deploy-aws.sh)\n\n1. Fetch AppPublicIP and DbPrivateIP from CloudFormation\n2. Deploy to DB instance first (direct SSH via DbPublicIP or ProxyJump)\n3. Wait 45s for Postgres to become healthy\n4. Deploy to App instance (migrate, then docker compose)\n5. Health check\n\n## Files Created\n\n| File | Purpose |\n|------|---------|\n| &#96;cloudformation.yaml&#96; | VPC, Subnet, IGW, SG, EC2, EIP, User Data |\n| &#96;docker-compose.aws.yml&#96; | All services, Certbot SSL |\n| &#96;nginx-aws.conf&#96; | Reverse proxy (HTTP→HTTPS, Frontend, API) |\n| &#96;nginx-aws.conf.template&#96; | Domain placeholder for custom domains |\n| &#96;Dockerfile.nginx-certbot&#96; | Nginx + Certbot image |\n| &#96;entrypoint-nginx-certbot.sh&#96; | SSL init + renewal loop |\n| &#96;init-letsencrypt.sh&#96; | Dummy certs helper |\n| &#96;backup.sh&#96; | pg_dump cron script |\n| &#96;user-data.sh&#96; | EC2 bootstrap (standalone reference) |\n| &#96;deploy-aws.sh&#96; | Build, upload, deploy |",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\DNA_ME_CRM_CURSOR_STEP_BY_STEP_GUIDE.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 194
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 278
          }
        },
        "contents": "Create docker-compose.yml with:\n1. PostgreSQL 15 (postgres:15-alpine)\n   - Database: dna_marketing\n   - User: dna\n   - Password: devpassword\n   - Port: 5432\n   - Volume for data persistence\n\n2. Redis 7 (redis:7-alpine)\n   - Port: 6379\n\nInclude healthchecks for both services.\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 1.5 Запусти Docker\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ndocker-compose up -d\n\n# Проверь что работает\ndocker-compose ps\n# Должны быть оба сервиса \"Up\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n✅ **Checkpoint:** &#96;npm install&#96; прошёл, Docker запущен, &#96;.env&#96; создан\n\n---\n\n# Этап 2: База данных (1 час)\n\n## 2.1 Создай конфиг подключения к БД\n\n**В Cursor Chat:**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nCreate src/config/index.ts that exports configuration object:\n- Read all values from process.env\n- Include: databaseUrl, redisUrl, port, webhookSecret, jwtSecret, slackWebhookUrl, mocoApiKey, mocoSubdomain\n- Validate required vars, throw error if missing\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 2.2 Создай подключение к PostgreSQL\n\n**В Cursor Chat:**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nCreate src/db/index.ts with PostgreSQL connection using 'pg' package:\n\n1. Create Pool with connection string from config\n2. Export helper functions:\n   - query(sql, params) - execute query, return rows\n   - queryOne(sql, params) - return first row or null\n   - getClient() - get client for transactions\n\n3. Add connection test on startup\n4. Handle connection errors gracefully\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 2.3 Создай полную схему базы данных\n\n**В Cursor Chat (это большой промпт):**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n@docs/MASTER_PROMPT_PART1.md\n\nCreate src/db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql with the complete database schema from Section 4.\n\nInclude ALL tables:\n1. organizations\n2. leads (with intent fields: primary_intent, intent_confidence, intent_summary, routing_status)\n3. intent_signals\n4. pipelines\n5. pipeline_stages\n6. deals\n7. events (PARTITIONED BY RANGE on occurred_at)\n8. scoring_rules\n9. score_history\n10. automation_rules\n11. tasks\n12. team_members\n\nInclude:\n- All indexes from the document\n- recalculate_lead_scores(lead_id) function",

      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "// src/db/index.ts\n// PostgreSQL Database Connection Pool\n// =============================================================================\n\nimport pg from 'pg';\nimport { config } from '../config/index.js';\nimport { DatabaseError } from '../errors/index.js';\n\nconst { Pool } = pg;\n\n// =============================================================================\n// Pool Configuration\n// =============================================================================\n\nconst poolConfig: pg.PoolConfig = {\n  connectionString: config.databaseUrl,\n  max: 20,                    // Maximum connections in pool\n  min: 2,                     // Minimum connections in pool\n  idleTimeoutMillis: 30000,   // Close idle connections after 30s\n  connectionTimeoutMillis: 5000, // Connection timeout\n  allowExitOnIdle: false\n};\n\n// =============================================================================\n// Create Pool\n// =============================================================================\n\nlet pool: pg.Pool | null = null;\n\nexport function getPool(): pg.Pool {\n  if (!pool) {\n    pool = new Pool(poolConfig);\n\n    pool.on('connect', () =&gt; {\n      console.log('✅ PostgreSQL client connected');\n    });\n\n    pool.on('error', (err) =&gt; {\n      console.error('❌ PostgreSQL pool error:', err.message);\n    });\n\n    pool.on('remove', () =&gt; {\n      console.log('PostgreSQL client removed from pool');\n    });\n  }\n\n  return pool;\n}\n\n// =============================================================================",

KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    lead_id         UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES leads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    intent          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,\n    rule_id         VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,\n DEALS\nCREATE TABLE deals (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    lead_id         UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES leads(id),\n    pipeline_id     UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pipelines(id),\n    stage_id        UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pipeline_stages(id),\n    name            VARCHAR(255),\n    value           DECIMAL(12,2),\n    currency        VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),",

        "contents": "-- =============================================================================\n-- DNA Marketing Engine - E-Mail Sequences Migration\n-- PostgreSQL 15+\n-- =============================================================================\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- EMAIL SEQUENCES\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE email_sequences (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    description     TEXT,\n    trigger_event   VARCHAR(50),              -- z.B. 'stage_enter', 'lead_created', 'form_submit'\n    trigger_config  JSONB DEFAULT '{}',       -- Zusätzliche Trigger-Konfiguration\n    is_active       BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- EMAIL SEQUENCE STEPS\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE email_sequence_steps (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    sequence_id     UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES email_sequences(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    position        INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    delay_days      INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\n    delay_hours     INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    subject         VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    body_html       TEXT NOT NULL,\n    body_text       TEXT,\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    UNIQUE(sequence_id, position)\n);\n\n-- =============================================================================\n-- EMAIL SEQUENCE ENROLLMENTS\n-- =============================================================================\nCREATE TABLE email_sequence_enrollments (\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),",
