        "contents": "};\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Score Decay\n- Points expire after 30 days of no activity\n- Decay rate: 10% per week after 14 days of inactivity\n- Reset on any new engagement\n\n---\n\n## 🔌 API SPECIFICATION\n\n### Base Configuration\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\nconst API_CONFIG = {\n  BASE_URL: process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL || 'https://api.dna-me.net/v1',\n  TIMEOUT: 30000,\n  RETRY_ATTEMPTS: 3,\n  RETRY_DELAY: 1000,\n};\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Authentication\n- **Method:** JWT Bearer Token\n- **Storage:** localStorage (auth_token)\n- **Refresh:** Token refresh endpoint available\n- **Headers Required:**\n  - &#96;Authorization: Bearer {token}&#96;\n  - &#96;X-Correlation-ID: {uuid}&#96; (for tracing)\n  - &#96;Content-Type: application/json&#96;\n\n### Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\nconst ROLES = {\n  ADMIN: {\n    name: 'admin',\n    permissions: ['*'], // Full access\n  },\n  SALES_MANAGER: {\n    name: 'sales_manager',\n    permissions: ['leads.*', 'deals.*', 'contacts.*', 'companies.*', 'reports.*', 'users.read', 'analytics.*'],\n  },\n  SALES_REP: {\n    name: 'sales_rep',\n    permissions: ['leads.read', 'leads.update', 'deals.*', 'contacts.*', 'companies.read', 'events.read'],\n  },\n  MARKETING: {\n    name: 'marketing',\n    permissions: ['leads.*', 'campaigns.*', 'analytics.*', 'automations.*', 'events.*'],\n  },\n  LAB_TECHNICIAN: {\n    name: 'lab_technician',\n    permissions: ['orders.read', 'samples.*', 'webhooks.read'],\n  },\n  VIEWER: {\n    name: 'viewer',\n    permissions: ['*.read'],\n  },\n};\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### REST API Endpoints\n\n#### Standard CRUD Resources\nAll resources follow React Admin data provider pattern:\n- &#96;GET /{resource}&#96; - List with pagination, sorting, filtering\n- &#96;GET /{resource}/{id}&#96; - Single record\n- &#96;POST /{resource}&#96; - Create\n- &#96;PUT /{resource}/{id}&#96; - Update\n- &#96;DELETE /{resource}/{id}&#96; - Delete\n\n**Resources:**\n- &#96;/leads&#96;\n- &#96;/deals&#96;\n- &#96;/contacts&#96;\n- &#96;/companies&#96;\n- &#96;/orders&#96;\n- &#96;/samples&#96;\n- &#96;/pipelines&#96;\n- &#96;/campaigns&#96;\n- &#96;/automations&#96;\n- &#96;/events&#96;\n- &#96;/webhooks&#96;\n- &#96;/webhook-logs&#96;\n- &#96;/integrations&#96;\n- &#96;/users&#96;\n- &#96;/reports&#96;",
        "signatures": {},

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\FRONTEND_PLAN.md",
        "range": {

        "contents": "# 🚨 CRITICAL CONTEXT FOR FRONTEND GENERATION\n\nWe are starting the Frontend implementation based on the provided PART 1 and PART 2 guides.\nHowever, there are STRICT DEVIATIONS from the standard guides due to the current project status.\n\n## 1. NO AUTHENTICATION (Dev Mode)\n- **SKIP** all instructions related to Login Page, Registration, or Auth Context.\n- **DO NOT** implement JWT or Session logic yet.\n- **HARDCODE** the API Key: In the Axios/Query client, automatically inject the header &#96;X-API-Key: frontend:dev_secret_key&#96; for ALL requests.\n- Assume the user is always \"Admin\" for UI permission checks.\n\n## 2. MISSING BACKEND APIs (Use Mocks)\nThe backend is 85% complete. The following APIs do NOT exist yet. For these sections, you MUST generate **Mock Data** files (&#96;src/lib/mocks/...&#96;) and simulate the API calls on the frontend side. DO NOT try to fetch from the real server for:\n- **Reports &amp; Analytics Dashboard** (Charts, MRR, Funnel) -&gt; USE MOCKS.\n- **Settings / Team Members** -&gt; USE MOCKS.\n- **Automation Rules Config** -&gt; USE MOCKS.\n- **GDPR Actions** -&gt; USE MOCKS.\n\n## 3. REAL BACKEND APIs\nConnect the real API (&#96;http://localhost:3000/api/v1&#96;) ONLY for these fully implemented sections:\n- **Leads** (List, Create, Kanban, Routing).\n- **Deals** (Pipelines, Drag &amp; Drop).\n- **Events** (Timeline).\n- **Tasks**.\n\n## GOAL\nGenerate the project scaffolding and the core CRM interface (Leads/Deals) connecting to the real backend, while mocking the rest.\n\n# DNA ME CRM Dashboard - Cursor Agent Prompt (Part 1 of 2)\n\n## 🎯 PROJECT OVERVIEW &amp; BUSINESS CONTEXT\n\nYou are building a comprehensive **CRM Admin Dashboard** for **DNA ME**, a GPU-accelerated genomic sequencing startup. This is a React-based administrative interface for managing multi-pipeline B2B sales, lead scoring, and marketing automation.\n\n### Company Context\n- **Business:** B2B genomic sequencing services (16S Microbiome, Metagenomics, Whole Genome)\n- **Target Market:** Research labs, biotech companies, universities (Germany/EU focus)\n- **Stage:** Pre-launch startup with aggressive go-to-market strategy",

          {
            "text": "We are starting the Frontend implementation based on the provided PART 1 and PART 2 guides.",

          {
            "text": "However, there are STRICT DEVIATIONS from the standard guides due to the current project status.",

            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 7
          },

            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "- **HARDCODE** the API Key: In the Axios/Query client, automatically inject the header &#96;X-API-Key: frontend:dev_secret_key&#96; for ALL requests.",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- Assume the user is always \"Admin\" for UI permission checks.",

            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 21
          },

event_id        UUID REFERENCES events(id),\n    rule_id         UUID REFERENCES scoring_rules(id),\n    category        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,\n    points_change   INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    new_total       INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    expires_at      TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    expired         BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,\n    expired_at      TIMESTAMPTZ,\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- AUTOMATION RULES\nCREATE TABLE automation_rules (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    description     TEXT,\n    is_active       BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\n    priority        INTEGER DEFAULT 100,\n    pipeline_id     UUID REFERENCES pipelines(id),\n    stage_id        UUID REFERENCES pipeline_stages(id),\n    trigger_type INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- TASKS\nCREATE TABLE tasks (\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\n    lead_id         UUID REFERENCES leads(id),\n    deal_id         UUID REFERENCES deals(id),\n    title           VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\n    description     TEXT,\n    task_type REFERENCES automation_rules(id),\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- TEAM MEMBERS\nCREATE TABLE team_members (\n    id         "contents": "# =============================================================================\n# DNA ME CRM — DB Instance (Postgres only)\n# Run on DB EC2 instance. Port 5432 accessible from App instance only via SG.\n# =============================================================================\n\nservices:\n  postgres:\n    image: postgres:15-alpine\n    container_name: dna_postgres\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_DB: dna_marketing\n      POSTGRES_USER: dna\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}\n    volumes:\n      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data\n    ports:\n      - \"0.0.0.0:5432:5432\"\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U dna -d dna_marketing\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n    restart: unless-stopped\n\nvolumes:\n  postgres_data:",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "version: '3.8'\n\nservices:\n  postgres:\n    image: postgres:15-alpine\n    container_name: dna_postgres\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_DB: dna_marketing\n      POSTGRES_USER: dna\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-devpassword}\n    volumes:\n      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data\n    ports:\n      - \"5432:5432\"\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U dna -d dna_marketing\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n    networks:\n      - dna_network\n\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7-alpine\n    container_name: dna_redis\n    command: redis-server --appendonly yes\n    ports:\n      - \"6379:6379\"\n    volumes:\n      - redis_data:/data\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"redis-cli\", \"ping\"]\n      interval: 10s\n      timeout: 5s\n      retries: 5\n    networks:\n      - dna_network\n\n  # Uncomment for production deployment\n  # api:\n  #   build:\n  #     context: .\n  #     dockerfile: Dockerfile\n  #   container_name: dna_api\n  #   environment:\n  #     NODE_ENV: production\n  #     PORT: 3000\n  #     DATABASE_URL: postgres://dna:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-devpassword}@postgres:5432/dna_marketing\n  #     REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379\n  #     MOCO_API_KEY: ${MOCO_API_KEY}\n  #     MOCO_SUBDOMAIN: ${MOCO_SUBDOMAIN}\n  #     SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}\n  #     WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${WEBHOOK_SECRET}\n  #     JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET}\n  #   ports:\n  #     - \"3000:3000\"\n  #   depends_on:\n  #     postgres:\n  #       condition: service_healthy\n  #     redis:\n  #       condition: service_healthy\n  #   restart: unless-stopped\n  #   networks:\n  #     - dna_network\n\n  workers:\n    ",

        "contents": "// =============================================================================\n// Route Registration\n// =============================================================================\n\nexport async function organizationsRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n  const organizationService = getOrganizationService();\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // GET /api/v1/organizations\n  // ===========================================================================\n  fastify.get&lt;{\n    Querystring: OrganizationFiltersInput;\n    Reply: OrganizationListResponse;\n  }&gt;(\n    '/organizations',\n    {\n      preHandler: validateApiKey,\n      schema: {\n        response: {\n          200: {\n            type: 'object',\n            properties: {\n              data: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: true } },\n              pagination: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: true }\n            }\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    async (request) =&gt; {\n      const parseResult = organizationFiltersSchema.safeParse(request.query);\n      if (!parseResult.success) {\n        throw new ValidationError('Invalid organization filters', {\n          validationErrors: parseResult.error.errors\n        });\n      }\n\n      const result = await organizationService.getOrganizations(parseResult.data);\n      return {\n        data: result.data.map(transformOrganizationResponse),\n        pagination: result.pagination\n      };\n    }\n  );\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n}",

        },
        "contents": "export async function organizationsRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // GET /api/v1/organizations/:id\n  // ===========================================================================\n  fastify.get&lt;{\n    Params: { id: string };\n    Reply: OrganizationResponse;\n  }&gt;(\n    '/organizations/:id',\n    {\n      preHandler: validateApiKey,\n      schema: {\n        params: {\n          type: 'object',\n          required: ['id'],\n          properties: {\n            id: { type: 'string', format: 'uuid' }\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    async (request) =&gt; {\n      const parseResult = organizationIdParamSchema.safeParse(request.params);\n      if (!parseResult.success) {\n        throw new ValidationError('Invalid organization ID', {\n          validationErrors: parseResult.error.errors\n        });\n      }\n\n      const organization = await organizationService.getOrganizationById(parseResult.data.id);\n      return transformOrganizationResponse(organization);\n    }\n  );\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // POST /api/v1/organizations\n  // ===========================================================================\n  fastify.post&lt;{\n    Body: CreateOrganizationInput;\n    Reply: OrganizationResponse;\n  }&gt;(\n    '/organizations',\n    {\n      preHandler: validateApiKey,\n      schema: {}\n    },\n    async (request) =&gt; {\n      const parseResult = createOrganizationSchema.safeParse(request.body);\n      if (!parseResult.success) {\n        throw new ValidationError('Invalid organization data', {\n          validationErrors: parseResult.error.errors\n        });\n      }\n\n      const organization = await organizationService.createOrganization(parseResult.data);\n      return transformOrganizationResponse(organization);\n    }\n  );\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n}",

        "contents": "// =============================================================================\n// Route Registration\n// =============================================================================\n\nexport async function teamRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // GET /api/v1/team\n  // ===========================================================================\n  /**\n   * List team members with filtering, searching, and pagination.\n   */\n  fastify.get&lt;{\n    Querystring: TeamMemberFiltersInput;\n    Reply: TeamMemberListResponse;\n  }&gt;(\n    '/team',\n    {\n      preHandler: validateApiKey,\n      schema: {\n        querystring: {\n          type: 'object',\n          properties: {\n            search: { type: 'string', description: 'Search in email and name' },\n            role: { type: 'string', enum: ['bdr', 'ae', 'partnership_manager', 'marketing_manager', 'admin'] },\n            region: { type: 'string' },\n            is_active: { type: 'boolean' },\n            page: { type: 'integer', minimum: 1, default: 1 },\n            limit: { type: 'integer', minimum: 1, maximum: 100, default: 20 },\n            sort_by: { type: 'string', enum: ['created_at', 'name', 'email', 'role', 'region', 'current_leads'], default: 'name' },\n            sort_order: { type: 'string', enum: ['asc', 'desc'], default: 'asc' }\n          }\n        },\n        response: {\n          200: {\n            type: 'object',\n\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "// =============================================================================",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {

          {
            "text": "// =============================================================================",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "export async function teamRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  // ===========================================================================",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "  // GET /api/v1/team",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },

        "contents": "// =============================================================================\n// Route Registration\n// =============================================================================\n\nexport async function pipelinesRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n  const pipelineService = getPipelineService();\n  const dealService = getDealService();\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // GET /api/v1/pipelines\n  // ===========================================================================\n  /**\n   * List all pipelines with optional summary metrics.\n   */\n  fastify.get&lt;{\n    Querystring: { include_inactive?: string; with_summary?: string };\n  }&gt;(\n    '/pipelines',\n    {\n      preHandler: validateApiKey,\n      schema: {\n        querystring: {\n          type: 'object',\n          properties: {\n            include_inactive: { type: 'string', enum: ['true', 'false'], default: 'false' },\n            with_summary: { type: 'string', enum: ['true', 'false'], default: 'false' }\n          }\n        },\n        response: {\n          200: {\n            type: 'object',\n            properties: {\n              data: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: true } }\n            }\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    async (request, reply) =&gt; {\n      const includeInactive = request.query.include_inactive === 'true';\n      const withSummary = request.query.with_summary === 'true';\n      \n      if (withSummary) {\n        const pipelines = await pipelineService.getAllPipelinesWithSummary();\n        return {\n          data: pipelines.map(p =&gt; ({\n            ...transformPipelineResponse(p),\n            deals_count: p.deals_count,\n            total_value: p.total_value,\n            stages_count: p.stages_count\n          }))\n        };\n      }\n      \n      const pipelines = await pipelineService.getAllPipelines(includeInactive);\n      return {\n        data: pipelines.map(transformPipelineResponse)\n      };\n    }\n  );\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n}",

        "contents": "// =============================================================================\n// Route Registration\n// =============================================================================\n\nexport async function triggersRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n  const triggerService = getTriggerService();\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // POST /api/v1/triggers/execute\n  // ===========================================================================\n  /**\n   * Führt einen Trigger manuell aus.\n   * Kann für Tests oder manuelle Aktionen verwendet werden.\n   */\n  fastify.post&lt;{\n    Body: ExecuteTriggerBody;\n  }&gt;(\n    '/triggers/execute',\n    {\n      preHandler: validateApiKey,\n      schema: {\n        body: {\n          type: 'object',\n          required: ['action', 'config', 'context'],\n          properties: {\n            action: {\n              type: 'string',\n              enum: [\n                'send_notification_email',\n                'enroll_email_sequence',\n                'create_moco_project',\n                'create_moco_customer',\n                'create_moco_offer',\n                'create_moco_invoice_draft',\n                'send_cituro_booking',\n                'send_slack_message'\n              ]\n            },\n            config: {\n              type: 'object',\n              additionalProperties: true\n            },\n            context: {\n              type: 'object',\n              properties: {\n                deal_id: { type: 'string', format: 'uuid' },\n                lead_id: { type: 'string', format: 'uuid' },\n                stage_id: { type: 'string', format: 'uuid' },\n                pipeline_id: { type: 'string', format: 'uuid' }\n              }\n            }\n          }\n        },\n        response: {\n          200: {\n            type: 'object',\n\n}",

from 'fastify';\nimport { z } from 'zod';\nimport { validateApiKey } from '../middleware/apiKey.js';\nimport { getTriggerService, type TriggerAction } from '../../services/triggerService.js';\nimport { db } from '../../db/index.js';\nimport { ValidationError, NotFoundError } from '../../errors/index.js';\nimport type { PipelineStage, AutomationStageConfig } from '../../types/index.js';\n\n//         "contents": "// src/api/routes/automation.ts\n// Automation Rules CRUD API Routes\n// =============================================================================\n\nimport type { FastifyInstance, FastifyRequest, FastifyReply } from 'fastify';\nimport { z } from 'zod';\nimport { db } from '../../db/index.js';\nimport { getAutomationEngine } from '../../services/automationEngine.js';\nimport { NotFoundError, ValidationError } from '../../errors/index.js';\nimport type { AutomationRule } from '../../types/index.js';\n\n// =============================================================================\n// Validation Schemas\n// =============================================================================\n\nconst triggerTypeEnum = z.enum([\n  'event',\n  'score_threshold',\n  'intent_detected',\n  'time_in_stage',\n  'stage_change'\n]);\n\nconst actionTypeEnum = z.enum([\n  'move_to_stage',\n  'assign_owner',\n  'send_notification',\n  'create_task',\n  'sync_moco',\n  'update_field',\n  'route_to_pipeline'\n]);\n\nconst createRuleSchema = z.object({\n  name: z.string().min(1).max(255),\n  description: z.string().optional(),\n  is_active: z.boolean().default(true),\n  priority: z.number().int().default(100),\n  pipeline_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),\n  stage_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),\n  trigger_type: triggerTypeEnum,\n  trigger_config: z.record(z.unknown()),\n  action_type: actionTypeEnum,\n  action_config: z.record(z.unknown())\n});\n\nconst updateRuleSchema = createRuleSchema.partial();\n\nconst paginationSchema = z.object({\n  page: z.coerce.number().int().positive().default(1),\n  limit: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(20),\n  trigger_type: triggerTypeEnum.optional(),\n  action_type: actionTypeEnum.optional(),\n  is_active: z.coerce.boolean().optional(),\n  pipeline_id: z.string().uuid().optional()\n});\n\n// =============================================================================",

      "codeBlock": {

        },
        "contents": "export async function pipelinesRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n\nasync (request, reply) =&gt; {\n\n      return metrics;\n    }\n  );\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // POST /api/v1/pipelines\n  // ===========================================================================\n  /**\n   * Create a new pipeline.\n   */\n  fastify.post&lt;{\n    Body: CreatePipelineBody;\n  }&gt;(\n    '/pipelines',\n    {\n      preHandler: validateApiKey,\n      schema: {\n        body: {\n          type: 'object',\n          required: ['name'],\n          properties: {\n            name: { type: 'string', minLength: 1, maxLength: 255 },\n            slug: { type: 'string', minLength: 1, maxLength: 100, pattern: '^[a-z0-9-]+$' },\n            description: { type: 'string' },\n            is_active: { type: 'boolean', default: true },\n            is_default: { type: 'boolean', default: false },\n            sales_cycle_days: { type: 'integer', minimum: 1 },\n            target_persona: { type: 'string', maxLength: 255 },\n            config: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: true }\n          }\n        },\n        response: {\n          201: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: true },\n          400: {\n            type: 'object',\n            properties: {\n              error: {\n                type: 'object',\n                properties: {\n                  code: { type: 'string' },\n                  message: { type: 'string' }\n                }\n              }\n            }\n          },\n          409: {\n            type: 'object',\n            properties: {\n              error: {\n                type: 'object',\n                properties: {\n                  code: { type: 'string' },\n                  message: { type: 'string' }\n                }\n              }\n            }\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    async (request, reply) =&gt; {\n      const pipeline = await pipelineService.createPipeline(request.body);\n      reply.status(201);\n      return transformPipelineResponse(pipeline);\n    }\n  );\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // PATCH /api/v1/pipelines/:id\n  // ===========================================================================\n  /**\n   * Update a pipeline.\n   */\n  fastify.patch\n\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\src\\api\\routes\\tasks.ts",
        "range": {

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 310,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export async function tasksRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // POST /tasks - Create task\n  // ===========================================================================\n  \n  fastify.post&lt;{\n    Body: z.infer&lt;typeof createTaskSchema&gt;\n  }&gt;('/tasks', async (request, reply) =&gt; {\n    const validatedData = createTaskSchema.parse(request.body);\n    const task = await taskService.createTask(validatedData);\n    \n    return reply.status(201).send({ \n      data: task,\n      message: 'Task created successfully'\n    });\n  });\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // PATCH /tasks/:id - Update task\n  // ===========================================================================\n  \n  fastify.patch&lt;{\n    Params: { id: string };\n    Body: z.infer&lt;typeof updateTaskSchema&gt;\n  }&gt;('/tasks/:id', async (request, reply) =&gt; {\n    const { id } = request.params;\n    \n    if (!z.string().uuid().safeParse(id).success) {\n      throw new ValidationError('Invalid task ID format');\n    }\n    \n    const validatedData = updateTaskSchema.parse(request.body);\n    const task = await taskService.updateTask(id, validatedData);\n    \n    return reply.status(200).send({ \n      data: task,\n      message: 'Task updated successfully'\n    });\n  });\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // POST /tasks/:id/complete - Complete task\n  // ===========================================================================\n  \n  fastify.post&lt;{\n    Params: { id: string }\n  }&gt;('/tasks/:id/complete', async (request, reply) =&gt; {\n    const { id } = request.params;\n    \n    if (!z.string().uuid().safeParse(id).success) {\n      throw new ValidationError('Invalid task ID format');\n    }\n    \n    const task = await taskService.completeTask(id);\n    \n    return reply.status(200).send({ \n      data: task,\n      message: 'Task completed successfully'\n    });\n  });\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n}",

        },
        "contents": "export async function leadsRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // POST /api/v1/leads\n  // ===========================================================================\n  /**\n   * Create a new lead.\n   */\n  fastify.post&lt;{\n    Body: CreateLeadInput;\n    Reply: LeadResponse;\n  }&gt;(\n    '/leads',\n    {\n      preHandler: validateApiKey,\n      schema: {\n        body: {\n          type: 'object',\n          required: ['email'],\n          properties: {\n            email: { type: 'string', format: 'email' },\n            first_name: { type: 'string', maxLength: 100 },\n            last_name: { type: 'string', maxLength: 100 },\n            phone: { type: 'string', maxLength: 50 },\n            job_title: { type: 'string', maxLength: 150 },\n            organization_id: { type: 'string', format: 'uuid' },\n            status: { type: 'string', enum: ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'nurturing', 'customer', 'churned'] },\n            lifecycle_stage: { type: 'string', enum: ['lead', 'mql', 'sql', 'opportunity', 'customer'] },\n            portal_id: { type: 'string', maxLength: 100 },\n            waalaxy_id: { type: 'string', maxLength: 100 },\n            linkedin_url: { type: 'string', format: 'uri', maxLength: 255 },\n            lemlist_id: { type: 'string', maxLength: 100 },\n            consent_date: { type: 'string', format: 'date-time' },\n            consent_source: { type: 'string', maxLength: 100 },\n            first_touch_source: { type: 'string', maxLength: 100 },\n            first_touch_campaign: { type: 'string', maxLength: 100 }\n          }\n        },\n        response: {\n          201: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: true },\n          409: {\n            type: 'object',\n            properties: {\n              error: {\n                type: 'object',\n                properties: {\n                  code: { type: 'string' },\n                  message: { type: 'string' }\n                }\n              }\n            }\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    async (request, reply) =&gt; {\n      const parseResult = createLeadSchema.safeParse(request.body);\n    }\n\n}",

        "contents": "const updateTaskSchema = \n\n});\n\nconst taskFiltersSchema = z.object({\n  lead_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),\n  deal_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),\n  assigned_to: z.string().email().optional(),\n  status: z.enum(['open', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled']).optional(),\n  task_type: z.string().optional(),\n  due_before: z.string().datetime().optional(),\n  due_after: z.string().datetime().optional(),\n  overdue: z.enum(['true', 'false']).transform(v =&gt; v === 'true').optional(),\n  page: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).default(1),\n  limit: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(20),\n  sort_by: z.enum(['created_at', 'updated_at', 'due_date', 'title', 'status']).default('due_date'),\n  sort_order: z.enum(['asc', 'desc']).default('asc')\n});\n\n// =============================================================================\n// Routes\n// =============================================================================\n\nexport async function tasksRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\n  const taskService = getTaskService();\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // GET /tasks - Search/list tasks\n  // ===========================================================================\n  \n  fastify.get&lt;{\n    Querystring: z.infer&lt;typeof taskFiltersSchema&gt;\n  }&gt;('/tasks', async (request, reply) =&gt; {\n    const filters = taskFiltersSchema.parse(request.query);\n    const result = await taskService.searchTasks(filters);\n    \n    return reply.status(200).send(result);\n  });\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n  // GET /tasks/statistics - Get task statistics\n  // ===========================================================================\n  \n  fastify.get&lt;{\n    Querystring: { assigned_to?: string }\n  }&gt;('/tasks/statistics', async (request, reply) =&gt; {\n    const { assigned_to } = request.query;\n    const stats = await taskService.getTaskStatistics(assigned_to);\n    \n    return reply.status(200).send({ data: stats });\n  });\n\n  // ===========================================================================\n}",

        "contents": "// src/api/routes/deals.ts\n// Deal Management API Routes\n// =============================================================================\n\nimport type { FastifyInstance } from =============================================================================\n\nconst dateOnlySchema = z.string().regex(/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/);\n\nconst createDealSchema = z.object({\n  lead_id: z.string().uuid(),\n  pipeline_id: z.string().uuid(),\n  stage_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),\n  name: z.string().max(255).optional(),\n  value: z.number().min(0).optional(),\n  currency: z.string().max(50).optional(),\n  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).optional()\n});\n\nconst updateDealSchema = z.object({\n  name: z.string().max(255).optional(),\n  value: z.number().min(0).optional(),\n  currency: z.string().length(3).optional(),\n  expected_close_date: z.union([z.string().datetime(), dateOnlySchema]).nullable().optional(),\n  assigned_to: z.string().uuid().nullable().optional(),\n  assigned_region: z.string().max(50).nullable().optional(),\n  metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).optional()\n});\n\nconst moveDealSchema = z.object({\n         "contents": "// src/api/routes/scoring.ts\n// Scoring Rules and Score Management API Routes\n// =============================================================================\n\nimport type { FastifyInstance, FastifyRequest, FastifyReply } from 'fastify';\nimport { z } from 'zod';\nimport { db } from '../../db/index.js';\nimport { getScoringEngine } from '../../services/scoringEngine.js';\nimport { SCORE_THRESHOLDS, getScoreTier } from '../../config/scoringRules.js';\nimport { NotFoundError, ValidationError } from '../../errors/index.js';\nimport type { ScoringRule, ScoreHistory, Lead } from '../../types/index.js';\n\n// =============================================================================\n// Validation Schemas\n// =============================================================================\n\nconst createRuleSchema = z.object({\n  slug: z.string().min(1).max(100).regex(/^[a-z0-9-]+$/, 'Slug must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens'),\n  name: z.string().min(1).max(255),\n  description: z.string().optional(),\n  rule_type: z.enum(['event', 'field', 'threshold']),\n  category: z.enum(['demographic', 'engagement', 'behavior']),\n  conditions: z.object({\n    event_type: z.string().optional(),\n    metadata: z.record(z.unknown()).optional(),\n    field: z.string().optional(),\n    operator: z.enum(['equals', 'in', 'contains', 'gte', 'lte', 'pattern']).optional(),\n    value: z.unknown().optional()\n  }),\n  points: z.number().int(),\n  max_per_day: z.number().int().positive().optional(),\n  max_per_lead: z.number().int().positive().optional(),\n  decay_days: z.number().int().positive().optional(),\n  priority: z.number().int().default(100),\n  is_active: z.boolean().default(true)\n});\n\nconst updateRuleSchema = createRuleSchema.partial().omit({ slug: true });\n\nconst paginationSchema = z.object({\n  page:\n;",

# DNA ME CRM Codebase Summary

## 1. Project Structure

### Root Directory (`e:\dname\crm_dna-me`)
- **Backend**: TypeScript/Node.js in `src/`
- **Frontend**: React-admin v5 in `frontend/`
- **Deployment**: AWS configs in `deploy/aws/`
- **Database**: Migrations in `migrations/`
- **Documentation**: Docs in `docs/`

### Key Directories:
```
├── src/                    # Backend TypeScript source
│   ├── api/               # API routes and middleware
│   ├── services/          # Business logic services
│   ├── db/                # Database connection & queries
│   ├── config/            # Configuration (env, redis, queues)
│   ├── workers/            # BullMQ background workers
│   ├── integrations/      # External integrations (Moco, Slack, Cituro)
│   └── types/             # TypeScript type definitions
├── frontend/              # React-admin frontend
│   └── src/
│       ├── components/   # React components
│       ├── resources/     # React-admin resources (leads, deals, etc.)
│       ├── providers/     # authProvider, dataProvider
│       └── pages/        # Custom pages
├── migrations/            # PostgreSQL migrations (node-pg-migrate)
├── deploy/aws/           # AWS deployment configs
└── docs/                  # Documentation
```

---

## 2. Backend Architecture

### Tech Stack
- Runtime: Node.js 20+
- Framework: Fastify 4.26.1
- Database: PostgreSQL 15+
- Queue: Redis 7 + BullMQ 5.1.6
- Language: TypeScript (strict mode)
- Validation: Zod 3.22.4
- Migrations: node-pg-migrate 7.0.0
- Logging: Pino 8.18.0

### Entry Point
- Main server: `src/index.ts`
- Workers: `src/workers/index.ts` (separate process)

### API Routes (`src/api/routes/`)
All routes prefixed with `/api/v1`:

1. **events.ts** - Event ingestion (webhooks)
2. **leads.ts** - Lead CRUD, filtering, scoring
3. **deals.ts** - Deal management, Kanban operations
4. **pipelines.ts** - Pipeline & stage management
5. **scoring.ts** - Scoring rules CRUD, score recalculation
6. **routing.ts** - Smart routing configuration
7. **organizations.ts** - Organization CRUD
8. **tasks.ts** - Task management
9. **team.ts** - Team member management
10. **campaigns.ts** - Campaign tracking
11. **automation.ts** - Automation rules
12. **triggers.ts** - Trigger management
13. **sequences.ts** - Email sequence management
14. **email.ts** - Email sending
15. **integrations.ts** - Moco/Slack/Cituro status & sync
16. **reports.ts** - Analytics & reporting
17. **gdpr.ts** - GDPR compliance endpoints

### Services (`src/services/`)
Business logic layer:
- `leadService.ts` - Lead operations, find-or-create, organization linking
- `dealService.ts` - Deal CRUD, stage movements, reordering
- `pipelineService.ts` - Pipeline & stage management
- `scoringEngine.ts` - Score calculation, rule evaluation
- `pipelineRouter.ts` - Smart routing logic
- `intentDetector.ts` - Intent detection (research/b2b/co-creation)
- `organizationService.ts` - Organization management
- `taskService.ts` - Task operations
- `triggerService.ts` - Trigger evaluation
- `automationEngine.ts` - Automation execution
- `reportService.ts` - Analytics aggregation
- `emailService.ts` - Email sending (Nodemailer)

### Database Schema (`migrations/1737475200000_initial-schema.sql`)
Core tables:
- `leads` - Contact info, scores, routing status, intent
- `organizations` - Company data
- `pipelines` - Sales pipelines (Research, B2B, Co-Creation, Discovery)
- `pipeline_stages` - Stages within pipelines
- `deals` - Opportunities linked to leads/pipelines
- `events` - Marketing events (partitioned by month)
- `intent_signals` - Detected intent signals
- `scoring_rules` - Configurable scoring rules
- `score_history` - Historical score changes with decay
- `automation_rules` - Automation triggers/actions
- `tasks` - Follow-up tasks
- `team_members` - Sales team (email, name, role, region, max_leads)
- `campaigns` - Marketing campaign tracking
- `api_keys` - Webhook authentication keys (NOT for user auth)
- `email_sequences` - Email marketing sequences
- `email_sequence_enrollments` - Lead enrollments in sequences

Note: No `users` or `sessions` tables. `team_members` exists but is not used for authentication.

---

## 3. Frontend Architecture

### Tech Stack
- Framework: React-admin v5.13.6
- Build: Vite 7.2.4
- UI: Material-UI (MUI) 7.3.7
- State: React Query (via react-admin)
- Styling: TailwindCSS 3.4.19 + Emotion
- Drag & Drop: @dnd-kit/core, @hello-pangea/dnd

### Entry Point
- `frontend/src/main.jsx` → `frontend/src/App.jsx`

### Key Components (`frontend/src/`)
- `App.jsx` - Main app, resource registration
- `providers/authProvider.js` - Auth provider (dev mode, no real auth)
- `providers/dataProvider.js` - React-admin data provider, API client
- `components/Dashboard/` - Dashboard with stats
- `components/Kanban/` - Kanban board for deals
- `resources/leads/` - Lead list/show/edit/create
- `resources/deals/` - Deal list/edit/create
- `resources/pipelines/` - Pipeline list/show
- `resources/organizations/` - Organization CRUD
- `resources/tasks/` - Task list
- `pages/LeadScoring/` - Scoring rules editor
- `pages/EmailMarketing/` - Email sequence builder
- `pages/Reports/` - Analytics dashboard
- `pages/Settings/` - Settings pages

### Resources (React-admin)
- `leads` - Full CRUD
- `deals` - List, create, edit (Kanban)
- `tasks` - List only
- `organizations` - Full CRUD
- `pipelines` - List/show (read-only)
- `events` - Read-only timeline

---

## 4. Authentication (Current State)

### Backend API Key Authentication

**Middleware**: `src/api/middleware/apiKey.ts`
- Function: `validateApiKey()` - Required for most routes
- Function: `optionalApiKey()` - Optional for some endpoints

**How it works:**
1. Reads `X-API-Key` header from request
2. Validates against `config.apiKeys` array (from `API_KEYS` env var)
3. Format: `API_KEYS=key1:source1,key2:source2` (comma-separated, colon-separated source)
4. On success: Attaches `request.apiKeySource` for audit logging
5. On failure: Throws `ApiKeyError` (401)

**Configuration** (`src/config/index.ts`):
- `API_KEYS` env var parsed into `config.apiKeys` array
- Example: `API_KEYS=prod_key:manual,test123:dev`
- Each key has a `source` label (e.g., "manual", "dev", "portal")

**Route Protection:**
- Most routes use `preHandler: validateApiKey`
- Health endpoints (`/health`, `/ready`) are public
- Webhook endpoints may use HMAC instead (`src/api/middleware/hmac.ts`)

**Database Table:**
- `api_keys` table exists but is NOT used by current middleware
- Current implementation uses env var only
- Table structure: `id`, `source`, `key_hash`, `description`, `is_active`, `last_used_at`

### Frontend Authentication

**Auth Provider** (`frontend/src/providers/authProvider.js`):
- Dev mode only — no real authentication
- Always succeeds, assumes user is "Admin"
- Methods:
  - `login()` - Auto-creates fake admin user in localStorage
  - `logout()` - Clears localStorage
  - `checkAuth()` - Always returns success, auto-creates user if missing
  - `checkError()` - Ignores auth errors
  - `getIdentity()` - Returns hardcoded admin identity
  - `getPermissions()` - Returns `['*']` (full access)

**User Storage:**
- Stored in `localStorage` as `auth_user`
- Format: `{ id: 'dev-admin', email: 'admin@dna-me.net', fullName: 'Admin (Dev Mode)', role: 'admin' }`

### Data Provider API Key

**Data Provider** (`frontend/src/providers/dataProvider.js`):
- Exports `API_KEY` constant: `import.meta?.env?.VITE_API_KEY || 'test123'`
- All HTTP requests include header: `'X-API-Key': API_KEY`
- API URL resolution:
  - Checks `VITE_API_URL` env var
  - Falls back to `VITE_API_FALLBACK` or production URL
  - Handles file:// protocol detection

**Build-time Configuration:**
- `VITE_API_KEY` injected at build time via deployment scripts
- `deploy/aws/deploy-aws.sh` extracts API key from `.env.aws`:
  ```bash
  FRONTEND_API_KEY=$(echo "$API_KEYS" | cut -d: -f1)
  VITE_API_KEY="$FRONTEND_API_KEY" npm run build
  ```

**Components Using API_KEY:**
- `dataProvider.js` - All standard CRUD operations
- `PipelineShow.jsx` - Custom API calls
- `PipelineList.jsx` - Custom API calls
- `Dashboard/index.jsx` - Analytics API calls

---

## 5. Deployment (AWS)

### AWS Infrastructure (`deploy/aws/`)

**CloudFormation Templates:**
- `cloudformation-ssm.yaml` - SSM-only deployment (no SSH)
- `cloudformation.yaml` - Standard deployment

**Architecture:**
- VPC with public subnet
- App Instance (EC2) - Runs Docker Compose
- DB Instance (RDS PostgreSQL) - Separate database instance
- Security Groups - Restricted access
- IAM Roles - SSM access, S3 deploy bucket access

**Docker Compose** (`deploy/aws/docker-compose.aws.yml`):
Services:
1. `redis` - Redis 7-alpine (persistent volume)
2. `api` - API server (port 3000)
3. `workers` - BullMQ workers (background jobs)
4. `frontend` - Nginx serving static build
5. `nginx-proxy` - Reverse proxy + Certbot (SSL)

**Nginx Configuration:**
- `nginx-aws.conf` - Reverse proxy config
- `Dockerfile.nginx-certbot` - Custom Nginx with Certbot
- Automatic SSL via Let's Encrypt
- Routes `/api/v1/*` → API container
- Routes `/*` → Frontend container

**Deployment Scripts:**
- `deploy-aws.sh` - Standard deployment
- `deploy-aws-ssm.sh` - SSM-based deployment (no SSH)
- `deploy-full.sh` - Full stack deployment
- `setup-dns.ps1` - PowerShell DNS setup
- `Deploy-Stack.ps1` - PowerShell CloudFormation deploy
- `Deploy-Stack-SSM.ps1` - PowerShell SSM deploy

**Environment Configuration** (`.env.aws`):
```bash
DOMAIN_NAME=crm.dna-me.com
LETSENCRYPT_EMAIL=admin@dna-me.com
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=...
DATABASE_URL=postgres://dna:PASSWORD@DB_PRIVATE_IP:5432/dna_marketing
REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
CORS_ORIGIN=https://crm.dna-me.net
JWT_SECRET=...
WEBHOOK_SECRET=...
API_KEYS=prod_key:manual
SMTP_HOST=...
```

**Deployment Process:**
1. Build frontend with `VITE_API_KEY` from `.env.aws`
2. Upload artifacts to S3
3. CloudFormation creates infrastructure
4. User data script installs Docker, pulls images
5. Docker Compose starts all services
6. Certbot obtains SSL certificate
7. Nginx routes traffic

---

## 6. Key Configuration Files

### Root `package.json`
- Scripts: `dev`, `build`, `start`, `workers`, `migrate:*`, `seed`
- Dependencies: Fastify, PostgreSQL (pg), Redis (ioredis), BullMQ, Zod, Nodemailer
- Type: ES modules (`"type": "module"`)

### Frontend `package.json`
- Scripts: `dev`, `build`, `preview`
- Dependencies: React-admin, MUI, Vite, TailwindCSS
- Type: ES modules

### Dockerfile
- Multi-stage build (builder + runner)
- Node 20-alpine
- Non-root user (`dna`)
- Health check: `wget http://localhost:3000/health`

### `docker-compose.aws.yml`
- Production Docker Compose for AWS
- Services: redis, api, workers, frontend, nginx-proxy
- Network: `dna_network` (bridge)
- Volumes: `redis_data`, `certbot_webroot`, `certbot_certs`

### `.env.aws.example`
- Template for AWS environment variables
- Includes: domain, database, Redis, CORS, security, SMTP, integrations

### `src/config/index.ts`
- Zod-validated configuration
- Parses env vars with defaults
- Exports `config` object with typed values
- Helper functions: `parseApiKeys()`, `parseBoolean()`

## Summary: Authentication State

### Current State
- Backend: API key authentication only (no user auth)
- Frontend: Dev mode bypass (no real auth)
- Database: `team_members` table exists but not used for auth
- No JWT/session-based user authentication
- No login/logout flow
- No user roles/permissions system

### Where Auth Code Lives
- Backend middleware: `src/api/middleware/apiKey.ts`
- Frontend auth provider: `frontend/src/providers/authProvider.js`
- Frontend data provider: `frontend/src/providers/dataProvider.js` (API key header)
- Config: `src/config/index.ts` (API keys parsing)

### What Needs to Be Added for User Authentication
1. User table (or extend `team_members`)
2. Password hashing (bcrypt)
3. JWT token generation/validation (`@fastify/jwt` already installed)
4. Login endpoint (`POST /api/v1/auth/login`)
5. Protected routes middleware (replace/combine with API key)
6. Frontend login page
7. Real auth provider implementation
8. Session/token storage (localStorage or httpOnly cookies)

The codebase is ready for adding user authentication: JWT plugin is installed, the structure supports middleware, and the frontend uses react-admin's auth provider pattern.
